          onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'&&!event.shiftKey){sendMessage();event.preventDefault()}"
          oninput="autoResizeInput(this)"></textarea>
        <button class="emoji-btn" onclick="openEmoji()"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M9 16C9.85038 16.6303 10.8846 17 12 17C13.1154 17 14.1496 16.6303 15 16" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M16 10.5C16 11.3284 15.5523 12 15 12C14.4477 12 14 11.3284 14 10.5C14 9.67157 14.4477 9 15 9C15.5523 9 16 9.67157 16 10.5Z" fill="currentColor"/><ellipse cx="9" cy="10.5" rx="1" ry="1.5" fill="currentColor"/></svg></button>
      </div>
      <button class="send" onclick="sendMessage()"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M8 12C12.6863 12 11.3137 12 16 12M16 12L13 9M16 12L13 15" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></button>
    </div>`;

  const avatarSrc = currentUser?.avatar_url || '';
  const headerAvatar = avatarSrc
    ? `<div class="header-avatar" onclick="showSettingsMenu()"><img src="${esc(avatarSrc)}"></div>`
    : `<div class="header-avatar" onclick="showSettingsMenu()" style="background:var(--gray-500);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#fff;font-size:var(--font-xs);font-weight:700">${(currentUser?.display_name || currentUser?.username || '?')[0].toUpperCase()}</div>`;

  if (isMobile) {
    const roomDesc = currentRoomObj?.description || '';
    document.getElementById('app').innerHTML = `
      <div class="header">
        <a href="/line-up" class="nav-icon" aria-label="Line-up" onclick="event.preventDefault();location.href='/line-up'">${ICON_CALENDAR}</a>
        <div class="header-info">
          <span class="title">${esc(roomName)}</span>
          ${roomDesc ? `<span class="online">${esc(roomDesc)}</span>` : ''}
        </div>
        ${currentRoomType !== 'dm' ? `<span class="header-count">${memberCount} ${USER_ICON}</span>` : ''}
        <button class="hamburger" onclick="toggleChatMenu()">${ICON_HAMBURGER}<span class="hamburger-dot"></span></button>
      </div>
      <div class="content" id="msg-scroll">
        <div class="messages" id="messages"></div>
        <div class="typing-indicator" id="typing"></div>
      </div>
      ${inputBar}
      ${_renderChatMenuHtml()}`;
  } else {
    const mainPanel = document.querySelector('.main-panel');
    if (mainPanel) {
      mainPanel.innerHTML = `
        <div class="header">
          <div class="header-info">
            <span class="title">${esc(roomName)}</span>
            ${currentRoomType !== 'dm' ? `<span class="online">${countText}</span>` : ''}
          </div>
          ${headerAvatar}
        </div>
        <div class="content" id="msg-scroll">
          <div class="messages" id="messages"></div>
          <div class="typing-indicator" id="typing"></div>
        </div>
        ${inputBar}`;
    }
    document.querySelectorAll('.room-item').forEach(el => {
      el.classList.toggle('active', el.dataset.roomId === currentRoom);
    });
  }

  renderMessages();
  dbg('[CHAT] renderChatView done, msgs=' + (messagesByRoom[currentRoom] || []).length);

  verify('renderChatView', document.getElementById('msg-input'), 'input rendered');
  verify('renderChatView', document.getElementById('messages'), 'messages container rendered');
  verify('renderChatView', document.querySelector('.input-bar'), 'input bar rendered');
  verify('renderChatView', document.querySelector('.action-toggle'), '+ button rendered');

  const input = document.getElementById('msg-input');
  if (input) {
    let typing = false;
    input.addEventListener('input', () => {
      if (!typing) { wsSend('typing', { room_id: currentRoom, active: true }); typing = true; }
      clearTimeout(input._typingTimeout);
      input._typingTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
        wsSend('typing', { room_id: currentRoom, active: false });
        typing = false;
      }, 2000);
    });
  }
}

function _dmBannerHtml() {
  if (currentRoomType !== 'dm') return '';
  const unencrypted = _unencryptedRooms.has(currentRoom);
  dbg('[E2EE] dm banner, room=' + currentRoom + ' unencrypted=' + unencrypted);
  const text = unencrypted
    ? 'Encryption unavailable for this user - messages are not end-to-end encrypted.'
    : 'Messages are end-to-end encrypted. Only you and the other person can read them.';
  return `<div class="dm-e2ee-banner">${esc(text)}</div>`;
}

function renderMessages() {
  dbg('[CHAT] renderMessages');
  const el = document.getElementById('messages');
  if (!el) { verify('renderMessages', false, '#messages not found'); return; }
  const msgs = (messagesByRoom[currentRoom] || []).filter(m => !blockedUserIds.has(m.user_id));
  el.innerHTML = _dmBannerHtml() + msgs.map(m => renderMessage(m)).join('');
  const rendered = el.querySelectorAll('.msg').length;
  verify('renderMessages', rendered === msgs.length, rendered + '/' + msgs.length + ' messages rendered');
}

function appendMessage(m) {
  if (blockedUserIds.has(m.user_id)) return;
  dbg('[CHAT] appendMessage', m.type, m.id);
  const el = document.getElementById('messages');
  if (!el) return;
  el.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', renderMessage(m));
  const newEl = el.querySelector(`[data-msg-id="${m.id}"]`);
  _observeNewMessage(newEl);
  if (m.type === 'image') {
    const img = newEl?.querySelector('.msg-image');
    if (img) img.onload = () => scrollToBottom();
  }
}

function renderMessage(m) {
  const isMe = m.user_id === currentUser?.id;
  const name = m.display_name || m.username || 'Unknown';
  const uid = m.user_id || '';
  const pendingCls = m.pending ? ' msg-pending' : '';

  let contentHtml = '';
  try {
    const c = JSON.parse(m.content);
    if (m.type === 'text') {
      const rawText = c.text || '';
      const failedCls = m._decryptFailed ? ' msg-decrypt-failed' : '';
      if (m.link_preview) {
        const lp = m.link_preview;
        contentHtml = `<a class="msg-link-preview" href="${esc(lp.url)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
          ${lp.image ? `<img class="link-preview-img" src="${esc(lp.image)}" loading="lazy">` : ''}
          <div class="link-preview-body">
            <div class="link-preview-title">${esc(lp.title || '')}</div>
            ${lp.description ? `<div class="link-preview-desc">${esc(lp.description)}</div>` : ''}
            <div class="link-preview-domain">${esc(lp.domain || '')}</div>
          </div>
        </a>`;
        contentHtml += `<div class="msg-text${failedCls}">${_linkify(rawText)}</div>`;
      } else {
        contentHtml = `<div class="msg-text${failedCls}">${_linkify(rawText)}</div>`;
      }
    } else if (m.type === 'image') {
      contentHtml = `<img class="msg-image" src="${esc(c.url)}" loading="lazy" onclick="event.stopPropagation();openImageViewer('${esc(c.url).replace(/'/g, "'")}')">`;
    } else if (m.type === 'video') {
      contentHtml = `<div class="msg-video-wrap" onclick="event.stopPropagation();toggleVideo(this)" ondblclick="event.stopPropagation()">
        <video class="msg-video" src="${esc(c.url)}" playsinline preload="metadata"></video>
        <svg class="msg-video-play" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><path d="M20.4086 9.35258C22.5305 10.5065 22.5305 13.4935 20.4086 14.6474L7.59662 21.6145C5.53435 22.736 3 21.2763 3 18.9671L3 5.0329C3 2.72368 5.53435 1.26402 7.59661 2.38548L20.4086 9.35258Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg>
        <svg class="msg-video-fullscreen" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" onclick="event.stopPropagation();expandVideo(this.closest('.msg-video-wrap'),'${esc(c.url).replace(/'/g, "'")}')"><path d="M22 14C22 17.7712 22 19.6569 20.8284 20.8284C19.6569 22 17.7712 22 14 22" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M10 22C6.22876 22 4.34315 22 3.17157 20.8284C2 19.6569 2 17.7712 2 14" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M10 2C6.22876 2 4.34315 2 3.17157 3.17157C2 4.34315 2 6.22876 2 10" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M14 2C17.7712 2 19.6569 2 20.8284 3.17157C22 4.34315 22 6.22876 22 10" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
      </div>`;
    } else if (m.type === 'location') {
      const label = c.label || 'Shared location';
      contentHtml = `<a class="msg-card card-location" href="https://maps.google.com/?q=${c.lat},${c.lng}" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center">
        <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" style="flex-shrink:0;color:#2a9d8f"><path d="M4 10.1433C4 5.64588 7.58172 2 12 2C16.4183 2 20 5.64588 20 10.1433C20 14.6055 17.4467 19.8124 13.4629 21.6744C12.5343 22.1085 11.4657 22.1085 10.5371 21.6744C6.55332 19.8124 4 14.6055 4 10.1433Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><circle cx="12" cy="10" r="3" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg>
        <div><div class="card-label">MY LOCATION</div><div class="card-title">${c.lat.toFixed(5)}, ${c.lng.toFixed(5)}</div></div>
      </a>`;
    } else if (m.type === 'meetup_invite') {
      const mid = c.meetup_id;
      const isCreator = m.user_id === currentUser?.id;
      contentHtml = `<div class="msg-card card-meetup" style="display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center" data-meetup-id="${mid}">
        <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" style="flex-shrink:0;color:var(--color-accent)"><path d="M2 12C2 8.22876 2 6.34315 3.17157 5.17157C4.34315 4 6.22876 4 10 4H14C17.7712 4 19.6569 4 20.8284 5.17157C22 6.34315 22 8.22876 22 12V14C22 17.7712 22 19.6569 20.8284 20.8284C19.6569 22 17.7712 22 14 22H10C6.22876 22 4.34315 22 3.17157 20.8284C2 19.6569 2 17.7712 2 14V12Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M7 4V2.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M17 4V2.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><circle cx="16.5" cy="16.5" r="1.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M2.5 9H21.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
        <div style="min-width:0;flex:1">
          <div class="card-label">MEETUP <span class="meetup-going" data-meetup-id="${mid}"></span></div>
          <div class="card-title">${escapeHtml(c.title)}</div>
          <div class="card-meta">${fmtTime(c.meetup_time)}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      ${isCreator ? '' : '<button class="meetup-join meetup-join-wide" data-meetup-id="' + mid + '" onclick="event.stopPropagation();toggleMeetupJoin(\'' + mid + '\',this)">Join</button>'}`;
      setTimeout(() => loadMeetupJoinState(mid), 0);
    }
  } catch {
    contentHtml = `<div class="msg-text">${escapeHtml(m.content)}</div>`;
  }

  let replyHtml = '';
  if (m.reply_to) {
    replyHtml = `<div class="reply-quote" onclick="scrollToMessage('${m.reply_to.id}')">
      <span class="reply-quote-name">${escapeHtml(m.reply_to.display_name || '')}</span>
      <span class="reply-quote-text">${escapeHtml((m.reply_to.text || '').slice(0, 60))}</span>
    </div>`;
  }

  const reactionsHtml = renderReactionPills(m.id, m.reactions);
  const reactBtn = `<button class="react-btn" onmouseenter="reactHoverIn(this.closest('.msg').dataset.msgId,this)" onmouseleave="reactHoverOut()" onclick="event.stopPropagation()" ondblclick="event.stopPropagation()"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M9 16C9.85038 16.6303 10.8846 17 12 17C13.1154 17 14.1496 16.6303 15 16" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M16 10.5C16 11.3284 15.5523 12 15 12C14.4477 12 14 11.3284 14 10.5C14 9.67157 14.4477 9 15 9C15.5523 9 16 9.67157 16 10.5Z" fill="currentColor"/><ellipse cx="9" cy="10.5" rx="1" ry="1.5" fill="currentColor"/></svg></button>`;

  const time = `<span class="msg-time">${fmtTime(m.created_at)}</span>`;

  const color = msgColor(m);

  if (isMe) {
    return `<div class="msg msg-mine${pendingCls}" data-msg-id="${m.id}" data-created-at="${m.created_at || ''}">
      <div class="msg-bubble msg-mine-bubble" style="background:${color.pastel}" ontouchstart="msgTouchStart('${m.id}',event)" ontouchmove="msgTouchMove(event)" ontouchend="msgTouchEnd()" ondblclick="msgDblClick('${m.id}')" oncontextmenu="event.preventDefault();showMsgMenu(this.closest('.msg').getAttribute('data-msg-id'),true)">
        ${reactBtn}
        ${replyHtml}${contentHtml}
        ${time}${reactionsHtml}
      </div>
    </div>`;
  }

  return `<div class="msg msg-other${pendingCls}" data-msg-id="${m.id}" data-created-at="${m.created_at || ''}">
    ${avatarHtml(name, m.color_index, true, m.avatar_url)}
    <div class="msg-bubble msg-other-bubble" style="background:${color.pastel}" ontouchstart="msgTouchStart('${m.id}',event)" ontouchmove="msgTouchMove(event)" ontouchend="msgTouchEnd()" ondblclick="msgDblClick('${m.id}')" oncontextmenu="event.preventDefault();showMsgMenu(this.closest('.msg').getAttribute('data-msg-id'),false)">
      ${reactBtn}
      <div class="msg-header">
        <span class="msg-name" style="color:${color.vivid}" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showUserMenu('${uid}','${jss(name)}')">${escapeHtml(name)}</span>
      </div>
      ${replyHtml}${contentHtml}
      ${time}${reactionsHtml}
    </div>
  </div>`;
}

function renderReactionPills(msgId, reactions) {
  if (!reactions || !reactions.length) return '';
  return `<div class="reaction-pills">${reactions.map(r => {
    const emoji = REACTION_KEYS.find(([e, k]) => k === r.emoji);
    const display = emoji ? emoji[0] : r.emoji;
    const isOwn = (r.user_ids || []).includes(currentUser?.id);
    const countHtml = r.count > 1 ? `<span style="font-size:10px;min-width:10px;text-align:center;display:inline-block">${r.count}</span>` : '';
    return `<button class="reaction-pill${isOwn ? ' own' : ''}" onclick="event.stopPropagation();toggleReaction('${msgId}','${r.emoji}')">${display}${countHtml}</button>`;
  }).join('')}</div>`;
}

function updateReactionPills(msgId, reactions) {
  const msgEl = document.querySelector(`[data-msg-id="${msgId}"]`);
  if (!msgEl) return;
  let pillsEl = msgEl.querySelector('.reaction-pills');
  const html = renderReactionPills(msgId, reactions);
  if (html) {
    if (pillsEl) pillsEl.outerHTML = html;
    else msgEl.querySelector('.msg-bubble')?.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', html);
  } else if (pillsEl) pillsEl.remove();
}

let _scrollLock = null;
function scrollToBottom() {
  dbg('[SCROLL] scrollToBottom');
  const el = document.getElementById('msg-scroll');
  if (!el) return;
  el.scrollTop = el.scrollHeight;
  requestAnimationFrame(() => { el.scrollTop = el.scrollHeight; });
  if (_scrollLock) _scrollLock.disconnect();
  const observer = new ResizeObserver(() => { el.scrollTop = el.scrollHeight; });
  observer.observe(document.getElementById('messages'));
  _scrollLock = observer;
  setTimeout(() => { observer.disconnect(); _scrollLock = null; }, 1500);
}

let _readObserver = null;
let _lastSeenTime = null;
let _markReadTimer = null;
let _markReadRoom = null;

function _setupReadObserver() {
  if (_readObserver) _readObserver.disconnect();
  _lastSeenTime = null;
  _markReadRoom = currentRoom;
  const scrollEl = document.getElementById('msg-scroll');
  if (!scrollEl) return;
  _readObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    if (document.hidden) return;
    let changed = false;
    for (const entry of entries) {
      if (!entry.isIntersecting) continue;
      const t = entry.target.dataset.createdAt;
      if (t && (!_lastSeenTime || t > _lastSeenTime)) {
        const msgId = entry.target.dataset.msgId;
        const text = entry.target.querySelector('.msg-text')?.textContent?.slice(0, 40) || '';
        dbg('[READ] seen', msgId, text);
        _lastSeenTime = t;
        changed = true;
      }
    }
    if (changed) _debouncedMarkRead();
  }, { root: scrollEl, threshold: 0.8 });
  document.querySelectorAll('#messages .msg[data-created-at]').forEach(el => _readObserver.observe(el));
}

function _observeNewMessage(el) {
  if (_readObserver && el && el.dataset.createdAt) _readObserver.observe(el);
}

function _debouncedMarkRead() {
  if (_markReadTimer) clearTimeout(_markReadTimer);
  _markReadTimer = setTimeout(() => {
    _markReadTimer = null;
    if (!_lastSeenTime || !_markReadRoom || !ws || ws.readyState !== 1) return;
    const msgs = messagesByRoom[_markReadRoom] || [];
    const unseenCount = msgs.filter(m => m.created_at > _lastSeenTime && m.user_id !== currentUser?.id).length;
    dbg('[READ] mark_read', _markReadRoom, 'unread:', unseenCount, 'was:', unreadByRoom[_markReadRoom] || 0);
    wsSend('mark_read', { room_id: _markReadRoom, timestamp: _lastSeenTime });
    if (unseenCount === 0) delete unreadByRoom[_markReadRoom];
    else unreadByRoom[_markReadRoom] = unseenCount;
    updateBadge(_markReadRoom);
    updateTabBadges();
    _updateTitleBadge();
    _updateAppBadge();
  }, 500);
}

function _flushMarkRead() {
  if (_markReadTimer) { clearTimeout(_markReadTimer); _markReadTimer = null; }
  if (_lastSeenTime && _markReadRoom && ws && ws.readyState === 1) {
    wsSend('mark_read', { room_id: _markReadRoom, timestamp: _lastSeenTime });
  }
}

function updateTypingIndicator() {
  dbg('[CHAT] updateTypingIndicator');
  const el = document.getElementById('typing');
  if (!el) return;
  const users = Object.keys(typingUsers[currentRoom] || {}).filter(id => id !== currentUser?.id);
  el.textContent = users.length ? 'Someone is typing...' : '';
}

function scrollToMessage(msgId) {
  dbg('[CHAT] scrollToMessage', msgId);
  const el = document.querySelector(`[data-msg-id="${msgId}"]`);
  if (el) { el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' }); el.classList.add('highlight'); setTimeout(() => el.classList.remove('highlight'), 1500); }
}

// --- Message interactions ---
let _longPressTimer = null;
let _swipeStartX = 0;
let _swipeStartY = 0;
let _swipeMsgId = null;
let _swipeMsgEl = null;
let _longPressTriggered = false;

function msgTouchStart(msgId, e) {
  _longPressTriggered = false;
  const msgRow = e.currentTarget.closest('.msg');
  _swipeMsgEl = msgRow;
  _swipeMsgId = msgRow?.dataset?.msgId || msgId;
  const touch = e.touches[0];
  _swipeStartX = touch.clientX;
  _swipeStartY = touch.clientY;
  _longPressTimer = setTimeout(() => {
    _longPressTriggered = true;
    window.getSelection()?.removeAllRanges();
    const realId = _swipeMsgEl?.dataset?.msgId || msgId;
    const msgs = messagesByRoom[currentRoom] || [];
    const m = msgs.find(msg => msg.id === realId);
    dbg('[MENU] longPress', realId, 'isOwn:', m?.user_id === currentUser?.id, 'created_at:', m?.created_at);
    showMsgMenu(realId, m && m.user_id === currentUser?.id);
  }, 500);
}

function msgTouchMove(e) {
  if (!_swipeMsgEl) return;
  const touch = e.touches[0];
  const dx = touch.clientX - _swipeStartX;
  const dy = Math.abs(touch.clientY - _swipeStartY);
  if (Math.abs(dx) > 5 || dy > 5) clearTimeout(_longPressTimer);
  if (dy > 30) { _swipeMsgEl.style.transform = ''; return; }
  const isMe = _swipeMsgEl.classList.contains('msg-mine');
  const validSwipe = isMe ? dx < 0 : dx > 0;
  if (validSwipe && Math.abs(dx) > 10) {
    const clamped = Math.sign(dx) * Math.min(Math.abs(dx), 30);
    _swipeMsgEl.style.transform = `translateX(${clamped}px)`;
    _swipeMsgEl.style.transition = 'none';
  }
}

function msgTouchEnd() {
  clearTimeout(_longPressTimer);
  if (_swipeMsgEl) {
    const transform = _swipeMsgEl.style.transform;
    const match = transform.match(/translateX\((-?\d+)px\)/);
    const offset = match ? Math.abs(parseInt(match[1])) : 0;
    _swipeMsgEl.style.transition = 'transform 0.2s';
    _swipeMsgEl.style.transform = '';
    if (offset >= 20 && !_longPressTriggered) {
      replyToMsg(_swipeMsgId);
    }
  }
  _swipeMsgEl = null;
  _swipeMsgId = null;
}

function msgDblClick(msgId) {
  replyToMsg(msgId);
}

function replyToMsg(msgId) {
  const msgs = messagesByRoom[currentRoom] || [];
  const m = msgs.find(msg => msg.id === msgId);
  if (!m) return;
  let text = '';
  try { text = JSON.parse(m.content).text || ''; } catch { text = m.content; }
  setReply(msgId, m.display_name || 'Unknown', text);
  dbg('replyToMsg:', msgId);
}

// --- Reply ---
function setReply(msgId, name, text) {
  dbg('[REPLY] setReply', msgId, name);
  replyTo = { id: msgId, display_name: name, text: text };
  const preview = document.getElementById('reply-preview');
  if (preview) {
    document.getElementById('reply-name').textContent = name;
    document.getElementById('reply-text').textContent = text.slice(0, 60);
    preview.classList.add('visible');
  }
  if (!isMobile) document.getElementById('msg-input')?.focus();
  verify('setReply', replyTo?.id === msgId, 'reply set to msg ' + msgId + ' by ' + name);
  verify('setReply', preview?.classList.contains('visible'), 'reply preview visible');
}

function cancelReply() {
  dbg('[REPLY] cancelReply');
  replyTo = null;
  document.getElementById('reply-preview')?.classList.remove('visible');
  verify('cancelReply', !replyTo, 'reply cleared');
}

// --- Reactions ---
let _reactDismissTimer = null;
let _reactActiveBtn = null;

function reactHoverIn(msgId, btn) {
  dbg('[REACT] reactHoverIn', msgId);
  clearTimeout(_reactDismissTimer);
  const existing = document.getElementById('reaction-picker');
  if (existing && existing._msgId === msgId) return;
  closeReactionPicker();
  _reactActiveBtn = btn;
  btn.classList.add('active');
  const picker = document.createElement('div');
  picker.id = 'reaction-picker';
  picker.className = 'reaction-picker';
  picker._msgId = msgId;
  picker.onmouseenter = () => clearTimeout(_reactDismissTimer);
  picker.onmouseleave = () => { _reactDismissTimer = setTimeout(closeReactionPicker, 500); };
  REACTION_KEYS.forEach(([emoji, key]) => {
    const b = document.createElement('button');
    b.textContent = emoji;
    b.onclick = (e) => { e.stopPropagation(); toggleReaction(msgId, key); closeReactionPicker(); };
    picker.appendChild(b);
  });
  document.body.appendChild(picker);
  const btnRect = btn.getBoundingClientRect();
  const pickerW = picker.offsetWidth;
  const centerX = btnRect.left + btnRect.width / 2 - pickerW / 2;
  picker.style.left = Math.max(4, Math.min(centerX, window.innerWidth - pickerW - 4)) + 'px';
  if (btnRect.top > 60) {
    picker.style.bottom = (window.innerHeight - btnRect.top + 4) + 'px';
  } else {
    picker.style.top = (btnRect.bottom + 4) + 'px';
  }
}

function reactHoverOut() {
  dbg('[REACT] reactHoverOut');
  _reactDismissTimer = setTimeout(closeReactionPicker, 200);
}

function closeReactionPicker() {
  dbg('[REACT] closeReactionPicker');
  clearTimeout(_reactDismissTimer);
  document.getElementById('reaction-picker')?.remove();
  if (_reactActiveBtn) { _reactActiveBtn.classList.remove('active'); _reactActiveBtn = null; }
}

function toggleReaction(msgId, emoji) {
  dbg('[REACT] toggleReaction', msgId, emoji);
  const msgs = messagesByRoom[currentRoom] || [];
  const msg = msgs.find(m => m.id === msgId);
  const existing = (msg?.reactions || []).find(r => r.emoji === emoji && (r.user_ids || []).includes(currentUser?.id));
  wsSend(existing ? 'remove_reaction' : 'add_reaction', { message_id: msgId, emoji });
}

// --- Actions ---
let _tempIdCounter = 0;
function genTempId() { return 'tmp_' + (++_tempIdCounter) + '_' + Date.now(); }

async function sendChatMessage(type, content, replyToId) {
  dbg('[CHAT] sendChatMessage', type);
  const roomId = currentRoom;
  const roomType = currentRoomType;
  let outgoingContent = content;

  if (roomType === 'dm' && E2EE.available) {
    let peerUserId = _getDmPeerUserId(roomId);
    if (!peerUserId) {
      dbg('[E2EE] peer unknown for room ' + roomId + ', waiting for room_history');
      await _waitForMembers(roomId, 5000);
      peerUserId = _getDmPeerUserId(roomId);
    }
    if (!peerUserId) {
      dbg('[E2EE] could not resolve DM peer for room ' + roomId + ', aborting send');
      showToast('Could not establish encryption');
      return null;
    }
    try {
      const envelope = await E2EE.encrypt(roomId, peerUserId, content);
      if (envelope === null) {
        if (_roomEncrypted.has(roomId)) {
          dbg('[E2EE] peer has no key but room is already encrypted, blocking send (fail closed)');
          showToast('Message not sent. Encryption error.');
          return null;
        }
        if (!_unencryptedRooms.has(roomId)) {
          _unencryptedRooms.add(roomId);
          showToast('Encryption unavailable for this user');
        }
        dbg('[E2EE] no key for peer, sending plaintext in room ' + roomId);
      } else {
        outgoingContent = envelope;
        _roomEncrypted.add(roomId);
        _unencryptedRooms.delete(roomId);
        dbg('[E2EE] message encrypted for room ' + roomId);
      }
    } catch (e) {
      dbg('[E2EE] encrypt error:', e && e.message);
      if (_roomEncrypted.has(roomId)) {
        showToast('Message not sent. Encryption error.');
        return null;
      }
      if (!_unencryptedRooms.has(roomId)) {
        _unencryptedRooms.add(roomId);
        showToast('Encryption unavailable for this user');
      }
    }
  }

  const tempId = genTempId();
  const now = new Date().toISOString();

  const optimisticMsg = {
    id: tempId, temp_id: tempId, room_id: roomId,
    user_id: currentUser.id, display_name: currentUser.display_name, username: currentUser.username,
    type, content, created_at: now, pending: true,
  };
  if (replyTo) optimisticMsg.reply_to = { ...replyTo };

  if (!messagesByRoom[roomId]) messagesByRoom[roomId] = [];
  messagesByRoom[roomId].push(optimisticMsg);
  if (roomId === currentRoom) {
    appendMessage(optimisticMsg);
    scrollToBottom();
  }

  const pendingEl = document.querySelector(`[data-msg-id="${tempId}"]`);
  verify('sendChatMessage', pendingEl, 'optimistic ' + type + ' in DOM id=' + tempId);

  const payload = { room_id: roomId, type, content: outgoingContent, temp_id: tempId };
  if (replyToId) payload.reply_to_id = replyToId;
  wsSend('send_message', payload);
  dbg('sendChatMessage:', type, 'temp_id=' + tempId);
  setTimeout(() => {
    const msgs = messagesByRoom[roomId] || [];
    const still = msgs.find(m => m.id === tempId && m.pending);
    if (still) {
      dbg('[CHAT] pending message timed out:', tempId);
      msgs.splice(msgs.indexOf(still), 1);
      document.querySelector(`[data-msg-id="${tempId}"]`)?.remove();
      showToast('Message not sent. Check your connection.');
    }
  }, 10000);
  return tempId;
}

function autoResizeInput(el) {
  var hardMax = _msgCharLimit + 50;
  if (el.value.length > hardMax) el.value = el.value.slice(0, hardMax);
  var cs = getComputedStyle(el);
  var lineH = Math.round(parseFloat(cs.fontSize) * 1.4);
  var pad = parseFloat(cs.paddingTop) + parseFloat(cs.paddingBottom);
  el.style.height = '0';
  var contentH = el.scrollHeight - pad;
  var maxH = lineH * 5;
  var h = Math.max(lineH, Math.min(contentH, maxH));
  el.style.height = h + 'px';
  el.classList.toggle('multiline', h > lineH + 2);
  var scrolling = contentH > maxH;
  el.style.overflowY = scrolling ? 'auto' : 'hidden';
  if (scrolling) el.scrollTop = el.scrollHeight;
  var over = el.value.length > _msgCharLimit;
  el.classList.toggle('overlimit', over);
  var sendBtn = el.closest('.input-bar')?.querySelector('.send');
  if (sendBtn) sendBtn.classList.toggle('disabled', over);
}

async function sendMessage() {
  const input = document.getElementById('msg-input');
  if (!input || !input.value.trim()) return;
  if (input.value.length > _msgCharLimit) return;
  const text = input.value.trim();
  if (_pendingDmTarget && currentRoom === 'pending-dm') {
    dbg('[DM] creating DM room on first message');
    try {
      const targetUserId = _pendingDmTarget;
      const res = await api('/dms', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ target_user_id: targetUserId }) });
      const roomId = res.room_id;
      _dmListCache[roomId] = targetUserId;
      _pendingDmTarget = null;
      currentRoom = roomId;
      history.replaceState(null, '', '/chat/d/' + roomId);
      wsSend('join_room', { room_id: roomId });
      input.value = '';
      autoResizeInput(input);
      try {
        await sendChatMessage('text', JSON.stringify({ text }), replyTo?.id);
      } catch (e) { dbg('[CHAT] sendChatMessage failed:', e && e.message); showToast('Could not send message'); }
      cancelReply();
      return;
    } catch (e) { showToast(e.message); return; }
  }
  try {
    await sendChatMessage('text', JSON.stringify({ text }), replyTo?.id);
  } catch (e) { dbg('[CHAT] sendChatMessage failed:', e && e.message); showToast('Could not send message'); }
  input.value = '';
  autoResizeInput(input);
  cancelReply();
  wsSend('typing', { room_id: currentRoom, active: false });
}

function toggleChatMenu() {
  dbg('[MENU] toggleChatMenu');
  const menu = document.getElementById('chat-menu');
  const overlay = document.getElementById('menu-overlay');
  if (!menu) return;
  const opening = !menu.classList.contains('open');
  menu.classList.toggle('open');
  overlay?.classList.toggle('open');
  if (opening) _populateMenuSections();
}

function closeChatMenu() {
  dbg('[MENU] closeChatMenu');
  document.getElementById('chat-menu')?.classList.remove('open');
  document.getElementById('menu-overlay')?.classList.remove('open');
}

async function toggleMenuSection(section) {
  dbg('[MENU] toggleMenuSection', section);
  const sectionMap = { rooms: 0, meetups: 1, dms: 2, online: 3, offline: 4 };
  const idx = sectionMap[section];
  if (idx === undefined) return;
  const buttons = document.querySelectorAll('#chat-menu .menu-section');
  const btn = buttons[idx];
  const items = document.getElementById('menu-' + section);
  if (!btn || !items) return;
  const expanding = !btn.classList.contains('expanded');
  btn.classList.toggle('expanded');
  items.classList.toggle('open');
  storageSet('menu_' + section, expanding ? '1' : '0');
  if (expanding) await _loadMenuSection(section, items);
}

async function _loadMenuSection(section, container) {
  if (section === 'rooms') {
    container.innerHTML = '<ul class="room-list">' + _renderRoomItemsHtml() + '</ul>';
  } else if (section === 'meetups') {
    try {
      const meetups = await api('/meetups');
      if (!meetups.length) { container.innerHTML = '<div class="empty">No active meetups</div>'; return; }
      container.innerHTML = '<ul class="room-list">' + meetups.map(m => {
        const unread = unreadByRoom[m.id] || 0;
        const badgeHtml = unread > 0 ? `<span class="unread-badge">${unread > 99 ? '99+' : unread}</span>` : '';
        return `<li class="room-item${currentRoom === m.id ? ' active' : ''}" data-room-id="${m.id}" onclick="closeChatMenu();openRoom('${m.id}','${jss(m.title)}','meetup')">
          <div class="room-info"><div class="room-name">${esc(m.title)}</div><div class="room-count">${fmtTime(m.meetup_time)} · ${m.attendee_count} going</div></div>
          <span class="room-badge">${badgeHtml}</span>
        </li>`;
      }).join('') + '</ul>';
    } catch { container.innerHTML = '<div class="empty">Could not load meetups</div>'; }
  } else if (section === 'dms') {
    try {
      const dms = await api('/dms');
      dms.forEach(dm => {
        _dmListCache[dm.room_id] = dm.other_user_id;
        if (dm.other_has_key === false) _unencryptedRooms.add(dm.room_id);
        else _unencryptedRooms.delete(dm.room_id);
      });
      if (!dms.length) { container.innerHTML = '<div class="empty">No conversations yet</div>'; return; }
      container.innerHTML = dms.map(dm => {
        const unread = unreadByRoom[dm.room_id] || 0;
        const badgeHtml = unread > 0 ? `<span class="unread-badge">${unread > 99 ? '99+' : unread}</span>` : '';
        const av = avatarHtml(dm.other_name, dm.other_color_index || 0, true, dm.other_avatar_url || '');
        const flag = countryFlag(dm.other_country);
        const lockHtml = _unencryptedRooms.has(dm.room_id) ? '' : ICON_LOCK;
        return `<div class="menu-member" data-room-id="${dm.room_id}" onclick="closeChatMenu();openRoom('${dm.room_id}','${jss(dm.other_name)}','dm')">
          ${av}
          <span class="menu-member-name">${lockHtml}${esc(dm.other_name)}</span>
          <span class="room-badge">${badgeHtml}</span>
          ${flag ? `<span class="menu-member-flag">${flag}</span>` : ''}
        </div>`;
      }).join('');
    } catch { container.innerHTML = '<div class="empty">Could not load DMs</div>'; }
  } else if (section === 'online' || section === 'offline') {
    const online = onlineByRoom[currentRoom] || [];
    const onlineIds = new Set(online.map(u => u.user_id));
    const allMembers = membersByRoom[currentRoom] || [];
    const users = section === 'online' ? online : allMembers.filter(m => !onlineIds.has(m.user_id));
    const sorted = [...users].sort((a, b) => {
      if (a.user_id === currentUser?.id) return -1;
      if (b.user_id === currentUser?.id) return 1;
      const aBlocked = blockedUserIds.has(a.user_id) ? 1 : 0;
      const bBlocked = blockedUserIds.has(b.user_id) ? 1 : 0;
      if (aBlocked !== bBlocked) return aBlocked - bBlocked;
      return (a.display_name || a.username || '').localeCompare(b.display_name || b.username || '');
    });
    if (!sorted.length) { container.innerHTML = '<div class="empty">No users</div>'; return; }
    container.innerHTML = sorted.map(u => {
      const isSelf = u.user_id === currentUser?.id;
      const name = isSelf ? (currentUser.display_name || currentUser.username || 'Anonymous') : (u.display_name || u.username || 'Anonymous');
      const avatarUrl = isSelf ? (currentUser.avatar_url || '') : (u.avatar_url || '');
      const blocked = blockedUserIds.has(u.user_id);
      const av = avatarHtml(name, u.color_index || 0, true, avatarUrl);
      const flag = countryFlag(u.country);
      const onclick = isSelf ? 'showSettingsMenu()' : `showUserMenu('${u.user_id}','${jss(name)}')`;
      return `<div class="menu-member${isSelf ? ' menu-member-self' : ''}${blocked ? ' member-blocked' : ''}" onclick="${onclick}">${av}<span class="menu-member-name">${esc(name)}${isSelf ? ' (you)' : ''}</span>${flag ? `<span class="menu-member-flag">${flag}</span>` : ''}</div>`;
    }).join('');
  }
}

async function _populateMenuSections() {
  updateTabBadges();
  const allSections = ['rooms', 'meetups', 'dms', 'online', 'offline'];
  const sectionMap = { rooms: 0, meetups: 1, dms: 2, online: 3, offline: 4 };
  for (const section of allSections) {
    const defaultOpen = section === 'rooms' || section === 'meetups' || section === 'dms';
    const stored = storageGet('menu_' + section);
    const shouldOpen = stored !== null ? stored === '1' : defaultOpen;
    if (!shouldOpen) continue;
    const btn = document.querySelectorAll('#chat-menu .menu-section')[sectionMap[section]];
    const items = document.getElementById('menu-' + section);
    if (btn && items) {
      btn.classList.add('expanded');
      items.classList.add('open');
      await _loadMenuSection(section, items);
    }
  }
}

function shareLocation() {
  if (!navigator.geolocation) { showToast('Geolocation not available'); dbg('shareLocation: geolocation API missing'); return; }
  dbg('shareLocation: requesting position...');
  showToast('Getting location...');
  navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(
    pos => {
      dbg('shareLocation: got position', pos.coords.latitude, pos.coords.longitude);
      const lat = pos.coords.latitude;
      const lng = pos.coords.longitude;
      showConfirm('Share your location?', `${lat.toFixed(5)}, ${lng.toFixed(5)}`, async () => {
        try {
          await sendChatMessage('location', JSON.stringify({ lat, lng, label: 'My location' }));
          showToast('Location shared');
        } catch (e) { dbg('[CHAT] sendChatMessage failed:', e && e.message); showToast('Could not share location'); }
      }, 'Share');
    },
    err => {
      dbg('shareLocation: error', err.code, err.message);
      if (err.code === 1) showToast('Location access denied. Check browser permissions.');
      else if (err.code === 2) showToast('Location unavailable');
      else if (err.code === 3) showToast('Location request timed out');
      else showToast('Could not get location');
    },
    { enableHighAccuracy: false, timeout: 10000, maximumAge: 60000 }
  );
}

async function resizeImage(file, maxSide) {
  dbg('[IMAGE] resizeImage', file.name);
  const bmp = await createImageBitmap(file);
  const longest = Math.max(bmp.width, bmp.height);
  if (longest <= maxSide * 1.1) { bmp.close(); return file; }
  const scale = maxSide / longest;
  const w = Math.round(bmp.width * scale);
  const h = Math.round(bmp.height * scale);
  bmp.close();
  const resized = await createImageBitmap(file, { resizeWidth: w, resizeHeight: h, resizeQuality: 'high' });
  const blob = await _bitmapToBlob(resized, w, h);
  return new File([blob], file.name.replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '.webp'), { type: 'image/webp' });
}

function uploadImage() {
  dbg('[IMAGE] uploadImage');
  const input = document.createElement('input');
  input.type = 'file'; input.accept = 'image/*';
  input.onchange = async () => {
    const file = input.files[0];
    if (!file) return;
    try {
      const resized = await resizeImage(file, 1500);
      const form = new FormData(); form.append('file', resized);
      const resp = await fetch(API + '/upload/image', { method: 'POST', body: form, credentials: 'include' });
      if (!resp.ok) { showToast('Upload failed'); return; }
      const result = await resp.json();
      if (!result.url) { showToast('Upload failed'); return; }
      await sendChatMessage('image', JSON.stringify(result));
    } catch (e) { showToast('Upload failed'); }
  };
  input.click();
}

let _mediabunny = null;
async function loadMediabunny() {
  if (!_mediabunny) {
    dbg('[VIDEO] loading mediabunny...');
    _mediabunny = await import('https://esm.sh/mediabunny@1.50.0');
    dbg('[VIDEO] mediabunny loaded, exports:', Object.keys(_mediabunny));
  }
  return _mediabunny;
}

function fmtSec(s) { const m = Math.floor(s / 60); return m + ':' + String(Math.floor(s % 60)).padStart(2, '0'); }

function showTrimEditor(file, objectUrl, duration) {
  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    dbg('[TRIM] opening editor, duration:', duration);
    document.getElementById('trim-editor')?.remove();
    const maxClip = 60;
    let trimStart = 0;
    let trimEnd = Math.min(duration, maxClip);

    const overlay = document.createElement('div');
    overlay.id = 'trim-editor';
    overlay.className = 'modal-overlay';
    overlay.innerHTML = `<div class="modal" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
      <div class="modal-header">
        <span class="modal-title">Trim Video (max ${maxClip}s)</span>
        <button class="modal-close" id="trim-cancel">×</button>
      </div>
      <div class="trim-editor">
        <video id="trim-video" src="${objectUrl}" playsinline preload="auto"></video>
        <div class="trim-controls">
          <div class="trim-duration" id="trim-dur">${fmtSec(trimEnd - trimStart)} selected</div>
          <div class="trim-track" id="trim-track">
            <div class="trim-range" id="trim-range"></div>
            <div class="trim-handle" id="trim-handle-start"></div>
            <div class="trim-handle" id="trim-handle-end"></div>
            <div class="trim-playhead" id="trim-playhead"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="trim-times">
            <span id="trim-start-time">${fmtSec(0)}</span>
            <span id="trim-end-time">${fmtSec(trimEnd)}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-footer">
        <button class="modal-btn-primary" id="trim-confirm">Trim & Share</button>
      </div>
    </div>`;

    const dismiss = () => { overlay.classList.remove('open'); setTimeout(() => overlay.remove(), 200); };
    overlay.addEventListener('click', () => { dismiss(); reject(new Error('Cancelled')); });
    document.body.appendChild(overlay);
    requestAnimationFrame(() => overlay.classList.add('open'));

    const video = document.getElementById('trim-video');
    const track = document.getElementById('trim-track');
    const rangeEl = document.getElementById('trim-range');
    const playhead = document.getElementById('trim-playhead');
    const handleStart = document.getElementById('trim-handle-start');
    const handleEnd = document.getElementById('trim-handle-end');
    const durLabel = document.getElementById('trim-dur');
    const startLabel = document.getElementById('trim-start-time');
    const endLabel = document.getElementById('trim-end-time');

    function updateUI() {
      const startPct = (trimStart / duration) * 100;
      const endPct = (trimEnd / duration) * 100;
      rangeEl.style.left = startPct + '%';
      rangeEl.style.width = (endPct - startPct) + '%';
      handleStart.style.left = 'calc(' + startPct + '% - 6px)';
      handleEnd.style.left = 'calc(' + endPct + '% - 6px)';
      durLabel.textContent = fmtSec(trimEnd - trimStart) + ' selected';
      startLabel.textContent = fmtSec(trimStart);
      endLabel.textContent = fmtSec(trimEnd);
    }

    video.addEventListener('timeupdate', () => {
      const pct = (video.currentTime / duration) * 100;
      playhead.style.left = pct + '%';
      if (video.currentTime >= trimEnd) { video.pause(); video.currentTime = trimStart; }
    });

    function makeDraggable(handle, getSet) {
      const onMove = (e) => {
        const rect = track.getBoundingClientRect();
        const x = (e.touches ? e.touches[0].clientX : e.clientX) - rect.left;
        const pct = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, x / rect.width));
        const time = pct * duration;
        getSet(time);
        updateUI();
      };
      const onUp = () => { document.removeEventListener('mousemove', onMove); document.removeEventListener('mouseup', onUp); document.removeEventListener('touchmove', onMove); document.removeEventListener('touchend', onUp); };
      handle.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); document.addEventListener('mousemove', onMove); document.addEventListener('mouseup', onUp); });
      handle.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); document.addEventListener('touchmove', onMove); document.addEventListener('touchend', onUp); }, { passive: false });
    }

    makeDraggable(handleStart, (t) => {
      trimStart = Math.max(0, Math.min(t, trimEnd - 1));
      if (trimEnd - trimStart > maxClip) trimEnd = trimStart + maxClip;
      video.currentTime = trimStart;
    });
    makeDraggable(handleEnd, (t) => {
      trimEnd = Math.min(duration, Math.max(t, trimStart + 1));
      if (trimEnd - trimStart > maxClip) trimStart = trimEnd - maxClip;
      video.currentTime = trimEnd - 0.1;
    });

    track.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      if (e.target === handleStart || e.target === handleEnd) return;
      const rect = track.getBoundingClientRect();
      const pct = (e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width;
      video.currentTime = pct * duration;
      video.play();
    });

    document.getElementById('trim-cancel').onclick = () => { dismiss(); reject(new Error('Cancelled')); };
    document.getElementById('trim-confirm').onclick = () => {
      dbg('[TRIM] confirmed, start:', trimStart.toFixed(1), 'end:', trimEnd.toFixed(1), 'duration:', (trimEnd - trimStart).toFixed(1));
      dismiss();
      resolve({ start: trimStart, end: trimEnd });
    };

    updateUI();
    video.currentTime = 0;
  });
}

async function processVideo(file) {
  dbg('[VIDEO] processVideo start, file:', file.name, file.type, (file.size / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(1) + 'MB');

  const vid = document.createElement('video');
  vid.preload = 'metadata';
  const objectUrl = URL.createObjectURL(file);
  vid.src = objectUrl;
  await new Promise((r, e) => {
    vid.onloadedmetadata = r;
    vid.onerror = (err) => { dbg('[VIDEO] metadata load error:', err); e(new Error('Cannot read video file')); };
  });

  const duration = vid.duration;
  const srcW = vid.videoWidth;
  const srcH = vid.videoHeight;
  dbg('[VIDEO] metadata loaded, duration:', duration, 'resolution:', srcW + 'x' + srcH);

  let trim = null;
  if (duration > 62) {
    dbg('[VIDEO] duration > 60s, opening trim editor');
    trim = await showTrimEditor(file, objectUrl, duration);
  }
  URL.revokeObjectURL(objectUrl);

  const srcBitrate = (file.size * 8) / duration;
  const mb = await loadMediabunny();
  const mbInput = new mb.Input({ source: new mb.BlobSource(file), formats: mb.ALL_FORMATS });
  const videoTrack = await mbInput.getPrimaryVideoTrack();
  const audioTrack = await mbInput.getPrimaryAudioTrack().catch(() => null);
  let srcFps = 30;
  try {
    const stats = await videoTrack.computePacketStats(100);
    srcFps = Math.round(stats.averagePacketRate);
    dbg('[VIDEO] packetStats: fps=' + srcFps + ' bitrate=' + (stats.averageBitrate / 1_000_000).toFixed(1) + 'Mbps count=' + stats.packetCount);
  } catch (e) { dbg('[VIDEO] computePacketStats failed:', e.message); }
  const srcAudioCodec = audioTrack ? await audioTrack.getCodec() : null;

  const oversize = srcW > 1920 || srcH > 1080;
  const highBitrate = srcBitrate > 10_000_000;
  const highFps = srcFps > 30;
  const needsAudioRecode = srcAudioCodec && srcAudioCodec !== 'aac';
  const needsTranscode = oversize || highBitrate || highFps || needsAudioRecode || trim !== null;

  dbg('[VIDEO] srcBitrate:', (srcBitrate / 1_000_000).toFixed(1) + 'Mbps, fps:', srcFps, 'audio:', srcAudioCodec,
    'oversize:', oversize, 'highBitrate:', highBitrate, 'highFps:', highFps, 'audioRecode:', needsAudioRecode,
    'needsTranscode:', needsTranscode, trim ? ('trim ' + trim.start.toFixed(1) + '-' + trim.end.toFixed(1)) : '');

  if (!needsTranscode) {
    dbg('[VIDEO] no processing needed, using original file');
    return file;
  }

  showToast('Processing video...');

  const output = new mb.Output({
    format: new mb.Mp4OutputFormat(),
    target: new mb.BufferTarget(),
  });

  let videoCodec = 'avc';
  try {
    const hevcSupport = await VideoEncoder.isConfigSupported({
      codec: 'hvc1.1.6.L120.B0',
      width: 1920, height: 1080,
      bitrate: 3_000_000,
      hardwareAcceleration: 'prefer-hardware',
    });
    if (hevcSupport.supported) videoCodec = 'hevc';
    dbg('[VIDEO] HEVC support:', hevcSupport.supported);
  } catch (e) { dbg('[VIDEO] HEVC check failed:', e.message); }
  dbg('[VIDEO] selected codec:', videoCodec);

  const videoOpts = { hardwareAcceleration: 'prefer-hardware' };
  if (oversize) {
    const scale = Math.min(1920 / srcW, 1080 / srcH);
    videoOpts.width = Math.round(srcW * scale);
    videoOpts.height = Math.round(srcH * scale);
    videoOpts.fit = 'contain';
  }
  if (oversize || highBitrate) {
    videoOpts.codec = videoCodec;
    videoOpts.bitrate = videoCodec === 'hevc' ? 3_000_000 : 4_000_000;
  }
  if (highFps) {
    videoOpts.frameRate = Math.round(srcFps / 2);
    videoOpts.forceTranscode = true;
    if (!videoOpts.codec) videoOpts.codec = videoCodec;
    if (!videoOpts.bitrate) videoOpts.bitrate = videoCodec === 'hevc' ? 3_000_000 : 4_000_000;
  }
  dbg('[VIDEO] videoOpts:', JSON.stringify(videoOpts));

  const audioOpts = needsAudioRecode ? { codec: 'aac', bitrate: 128_000 } : {};
  const convOpts = { input: mbInput, output, video: videoOpts, audio: audioOpts };
  if (trim) convOpts.trim = { start: trim.start, end: trim.end };

  dbg('[VIDEO] initializing conversion...');
  const conversion = await mb.Conversion.init(convOpts);

  if (!conversion.isValid) {
    dbg('[VIDEO] conversion not valid, discarded:', conversion.discardedTracks);
    throw new Error('Cannot process this video format');
  }
  dbg('[VIDEO] conversion valid, utilized tracks:', conversion.utilizedTracks);

  conversion.onProgress = (p) => {
    dbg('[VIDEO] progress:', Math.round(p * 100) + '%');
    showToast('Processing video ' + Math.round(p * 100) + '%...');
  };

  dbg('[VIDEO] executing conversion...');
  await conversion.execute();

  const buf = output.target.buffer;
  dbg('[VIDEO] conversion done, output size:', (buf.byteLength / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(1) + 'MB');
  return new File([buf], file.name.replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '.mp4'), { type: 'video/mp4' });
}

function uploadVideo() {
  if (!('VideoEncoder' in window)) {
    showToast('Video processing is not supported in this browser. Please use Chrome.');
    return;
  }
  const input = document.createElement('input');
  input.type = 'file'; input.accept = 'video/*';
  input.onchange = async () => {
    const file = input.files[0];
    if (!file) return;
    dbg('[VIDEO] file selected:', file.name, file.type, (file.size / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(1) + 'MB');
    try {
      const processed = await processVideo(file);
      if (processed.size > 100 * 1024 * 1024) {
        dbg('[VIDEO] rejected: processed size', (processed.size / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(1) + 'MB > 100MB');
        showToast('Video too large (max 100MB)'); return;
      }
      dbg('[VIDEO] uploading', (processed.size / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(1) + 'MB...');
      showToast('Uploading video...');
      const form = new FormData(); form.append('file', processed);
      const resp = await fetch(API + '/upload/video', { method: 'POST', body: form, credentials: 'include' });
      dbg('[VIDEO] upload response status:', resp.status);
      if (!resp.ok) {
        const err = await resp.text();
        dbg('[VIDEO] upload error:', err);
        throw new Error('Upload failed: ' + resp.status);
      }
      const result = await resp.json();
      dbg('[VIDEO] upload result:', result);
      await sendChatMessage('video', JSON.stringify(result));
      showToast('Video shared');
    } catch (e) {
      dbg('[VIDEO] error:', e.message, e.stack);
      showToast(e.message || 'Video upload failed');
    }
  };
  input.click();
}

// --- Meetup modal ---
let _meetupCoords = null;

async function loadMeetupJoinState(meetupId) {
  dbg('[MEETUP] loadMeetupJoinState', meetupId);
  try {
    const data = await api('/meetups/' + meetupId);
    const joined = data.attendees?.some(a => a.id === currentUser?.id);
    const count = data.attendee_count || data.attendees?.length || 0;
    document.querySelectorAll(`.meetup-going[data-meetup-id="${meetupId}"]`).forEach(el => {
      el.textContent = count > 0 ? ' · ' + count + ' going' : '';
    });
    document.querySelectorAll(`.meetup-join[data-meetup-id="${meetupId}"]`).forEach(btn => {
      btn.textContent = joined ? 'Joined' : 'Join';
      btn.classList.toggle('joined', !!joined);
    });
  } catch (e) { dbg('[MEETUP] loadMeetupJoinState error:', e.message); }
}

async function toggleMeetupJoin(meetupId, btn) {
  dbg('[MEETUP] toggleMeetupJoin', meetupId);
  const isJoined = btn.classList.contains('joined');
  try {
    if (isJoined) {
      await api('/meetups/' + meetupId + '/join', { method: 'DELETE' });
      await loadMeetupJoinState(meetupId);
    } else {
      await api('/meetups/' + meetupId + '/join', { method: 'POST' });
      await loadMeetupJoinState(meetupId);
      wsSend('join_room', { room_id: meetupId });
      dbg('[MEETUP] joined room for notifications', meetupId);
    }
  } catch (e) { showToast(e.message); }
}

function openMeetupModal() {
  dbg('[MEETUP] openMeetupModal');
  document.getElementById('meetup-modal')?.remove();
  const d = new Date(Math.ceil((Date.now() + 900000) / 900000) * 900000);
  const defaultDate = new Date(d.getTime() - d.getTimezoneOffset() * 60000).toISOString().slice(0, 10);
  const defaultHour = d.getHours();
  const defaultMin = d.getMinutes();
  const hourOpts = Array.from({length: 24}, (_, i) => `<option value="${i}"${i === defaultHour ? ' selected' : ''}>${String(i).padStart(2, '0')}</option>`).join('');
  const minOpts = [0, 15, 30, 45].map(m => `<option value="${m}"${m === defaultMin ? ' selected' : ''}>${String(m).padStart(2, '0')}</option>`).join('');
  const modal = document.createElement('div');
  modal.id = 'meetup-modal';
  modal.className = 'modal-overlay';
  modal.innerHTML = `<div class="modal" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <span class="modal-title">Create Meetup</span>
      <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeMeetupModal()">×</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <label class="modal-label">Title</label>
      <input id="meetup-title" class="modal-input" placeholder="e.g. Drinks at the bar" maxlength="60">
      <label class="modal-label">Date & Time</label>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:8px">
        <input id="meetup-date" class="modal-input" type="date" value="${defaultDate}" style="flex:1">
        <select id="meetup-hour" class="modal-input" style="width:auto">${hourOpts}</select>
        <span style="align-self:center;color:var(--color-muted)">:</span>
        <select id="meetup-min" class="modal-input" style="width:auto">${minOpts}</select>
      </div>
      <label class="modal-label">Location</label>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:8px">
        <input id="meetup-location" class="modal-input" placeholder="e.g. Main bar area" style="flex:1">
        <button class="modal-btn-secondary" onclick="useMeetupGPS()">📍 GPS</button>
      </div>
      <label class="modal-label">Note (optional)</label>
      <textarea id="meetup-note" class="modal-textarea" placeholder="Any extra info..." rows="2"></textarea>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer">
      <button class="modal-btn-primary" onclick="submitMeetup()">Create Meetup</button>
    </div>
  </div>`;
  modal.addEventListener('click', closeMeetupModal);
  document.body.appendChild(modal);
  requestAnimationFrame(() => {
    modal.classList.add('open');
    verify('openMeetupModal', document.getElementById('meetup-modal'), 'modal in DOM');
    verify('openMeetupModal', document.getElementById('meetup-title'), 'title input exists');
    verify('openMeetupModal', document.getElementById('meetup-date'), 'date input exists');
    verify('openMeetupModal', document.getElementById('meetup-location'), 'location input exists');
  });
  document.getElementById('meetup-title').focus();
}

function useMeetupGPS() {
  dbg('[MEETUP] useMeetupGPS');
  if (!navigator.geolocation) { showToast('Geolocation not available'); return; }
  navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(pos => {
    _meetupCoords = { lat: pos.coords.latitude, lng: pos.coords.longitude };
    document.getElementById('meetup-location').value = `${pos.coords.latitude.toFixed(4)}, ${pos.coords.longitude.toFixed(4)}`;
    showToast('Location set');
  }, () => showToast('Could not get location'));
}

function submitMeetup() {
  dbg('[MEETUP] submitMeetup');
  const title = document.getElementById('meetup-title').value.trim();
  const dateVal = document.getElementById('meetup-date').value;
  const hour = document.getElementById('meetup-hour').value;
  const min = document.getElementById('meetup-min').value;
  const locationLabel = document.getElementById('meetup-location').value.trim();
  const note = document.getElementById('meetup-note').value.trim();
  if (!title) { showToast('Please enter a title'); return; }
  if (!dateVal) { showToast('Please pick a date'); return; }
  const meetupDate = new Date(`${dateVal}T${String(hour).padStart(2,'0')}:${String(min).padStart(2,'0')}:00`);
  const payload = { stage_id: currentRoom, title, meetup_time: meetupDate.toISOString() };
  if (_meetupCoords) { payload.lat = _meetupCoords.lat; payload.lng = _meetupCoords.lng; }
  if (locationLabel) payload.label = locationLabel;
  if (note) payload.note = note;
  wsSend('create_meetup', payload);
  dbg('submitMeetup: sent', payload.title, payload.meetup_time);
  verify('submitMeetup', true, 'meetup "' + payload.title + '" submitted');
  closeMeetupModal();
  showToast('Meetup created!');
}

function showConfirm(title, detail, onConfirm, btnLabel) {
  dbg('[DIALOG] showConfirm', title);
  document.getElementById('confirm-dialog')?.remove();
  const dismiss = () => { overlay.classList.remove('open'); setTimeout(() => overlay.remove(), 200); };
  const overlay = document.createElement('div');
  overlay.id = 'confirm-dialog';
  overlay.className = 'modal-overlay';
  overlay.innerHTML = `<div class="modal" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <span class="modal-title">${escapeHtml(title)}</span>
      <button class="modal-close" id="confirm-close">×</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      ${detail ? '<div style="color:var(--color-muted);font-size:var(--font-sm)">' + escapeHtml(detail) + '</div>' : ''}
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer">
      <button class="modal-btn-primary" id="confirm-yes">${escapeHtml(btnLabel || 'Confirm')}</button>
    </div>
  </div>`;
  overlay.addEventListener('click', dismiss);
  document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  document.getElementById('confirm-yes').onclick = () => { dismiss(); onConfirm(); };
  document.getElementById('confirm-close').onclick = dismiss;
  requestAnimationFrame(() => overlay.classList.add('open'));
}

function closeMeetupModal() {
  dbg('[MEETUP] closeMeetupModal');
  const modal = document.getElementById('meetup-modal');
  if (modal) { modal.classList.remove('open'); setTimeout(() => { modal.remove(); verify('closeMeetupModal', !document.getElementById('meetup-modal'), 'modal removed from DOM'); }, 200); }
  _meetupCoords = null;
}

// --- User menu (action sheet) ---
function showUserMenu(userId, name) {
  dbg('[MENU] showUserMenu', userId, name);
  if (userId === currentUser?.id) return;
  document.getElementById('action-sheet')?.remove();
  const sheet = document.createElement('div');
  sheet.id = 'action-sheet';
  sheet.className = 'action-sheet-overlay';
  const isBlocked = blockedUserIds.has(userId);
  const blockBtn = isBlocked
    ? `<button class="action-sheet-btn" onclick="closeActionSheet();_unblockUser('${userId}');showToast('${jss(name)} unblocked')">Unblock User</button>`
    : `<button class="action-sheet-btn action-sheet-danger" onclick="closeActionSheet();blockUserConfirm('${userId}','${jss(name)}')">Block User</button>`;
  sheet.innerHTML = `<div class="action-sheet" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
    <div class="action-sheet-title">${escapeHtml(name)}</div>
    ${isBlocked ? '' : `<button class="action-sheet-btn" onclick="closeActionSheet();wsSend('open_dm',{target_user_id:'${userId}'})">Send Message</button>`}
    ${blockBtn}
    <button class="action-sheet-btn action-sheet-cancel" onclick="closeActionSheet()">Cancel</button>
  </div>`;
  sheet.addEventListener('click', closeActionSheet);
  document.body.appendChild(sheet);
  requestAnimationFrame(() => sheet.classList.add('open'));
}

function closeActionSheet() {
  dbg('[MENU] closeActionSheet');
  const sheet = document.getElementById('action-sheet');
  if (sheet) { sheet.classList.remove('open'); setTimeout(() => sheet.remove(), 200); }
}

function _doBlock(userId, name, report, msgId) {
  wsSend('block_user', { target_user_id: userId });
  blockedUserIds.add(userId);
  delete E2EE._deviceLists[userId];
  E2EE._keks = {};
  dbg('[E2EE] cleared cached device list + keks for blocked user', userId);
  if (report && msgId) {
    wsSend('report_message', { message_id: msgId, reason: 'Blocked and reported by user' });
  }
  renderMessages();
  renderMemberItems();
  _populateMenuSections();
  showToast(escapeHtml(name) + ' blocked' + (report ? ' and reported' : ''));
}

function blockUserConfirm(userId, name) {
  dbg('[MENU] blockUserConfirm', userId, name);
  document.getElementById('action-sheet')?.remove();
  const sheet = document.createElement('div');
  sheet.id = 'action-sheet';
  sheet.className = 'action-sheet-overlay';
  sheet.innerHTML = `<div class="action-sheet" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
    <div class="action-sheet-title">Block ${escapeHtml(name)}?</div>
    <p class="action-sheet-desc">You will no longer see their messages</p>
    <button class="action-sheet-btn action-sheet-danger" onclick="closeActionSheet();_doBlock('${userId}','${jss(name)}')">Block</button>
    <button class="action-sheet-btn action-sheet-cancel" onclick="closeActionSheet()">Cancel</button>
  </div>`;
  sheet.addEventListener('click', closeActionSheet);
  document.body.appendChild(sheet);
  requestAnimationFrame(() => sheet.classList.add('open'));
}

// --- Message context menu ---
function showMsgMenu(msgId, isOwn) {
  dbg('[MENU] showMsgMenu', msgId, isOwn);
  closeActionSheet();
  const msgs = messagesByRoom[currentRoom] || [];
  const m = msgs.find(msg => msg.id === msgId);
  let canUnsend = false;
  if (isOwn && m && m.created_at) {
    const age = (Date.now() - new Date(m.created_at).getTime()) / 1000;
    canUnsend = age <= 120;
  }
  const sheet = document.createElement('div');
  sheet.id = 'action-sheet';
  sheet.className = 'action-sheet-overlay';
  let buttons = '<div class="action-sheet-title">Message</div>';
  buttons += '<button class="action-sheet-btn" onclick="closeActionSheet();replyToMsg(\'' + msgId + '\')">Reply</button>';
  if (canUnsend) {
    buttons += '<button class="action-sheet-btn action-sheet-danger" onclick="msgMenuConfirmUnsend(\'' + msgId + '\')">Delete for everyone</button>';
  }
  if (!isOwn && m) {
    buttons += '<button class="action-sheet-btn action-sheet-danger" onclick="closeActionSheet();_reportMessage(\'' + msgId + '\',\'' + (m.user_id || '') + '\',\'' + jss(m.display_name || '') + '\')">Report</button>';
  }
  buttons += '<button class="action-sheet-btn action-sheet-cancel" onclick="closeActionSheet()">Cancel</button>';
  sheet.innerHTML = '<div class="action-sheet" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">' + buttons + '</div>';
  sheet.addEventListener('click', closeActionSheet);
  document.body.appendChild(sheet);
  requestAnimationFrame(() => sheet.classList.add('open'));
}

function _submitReport(msgId, reason) {
  const msgs = messagesByRoom[currentRoom] || [];
  const m = msgs.find(msg => msg.id === msgId);
  const payload = { message_id: msgId, reason };
  if (m && m.content) payload.message_content = m.content;
  dbg('[E2EE] submitting report for msg', msgId, 'content_len=' + (payload.message_content || '').length);
  wsSend('report_message', payload);
  showToast('Report submitted');
}

function _reportMessage(msgId, userId, name) {
  dbg('[MENU] reportMessage', msgId);
  const sheet = document.createElement('div');
  sheet.id = 'action-sheet';
  sheet.className = 'action-sheet-overlay';
  sheet.innerHTML = `<div class="action-sheet" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
    <div class="action-sheet-title">Report this message?</div>
    <p class="action-sheet-desc">This will be reviewed by an admin</p>
    <button class="action-sheet-btn action-sheet-danger" onclick="closeActionSheet();_submitReport('${msgId}','Reported by user')">Report</button>
    <button class="action-sheet-btn action-sheet-danger" onclick="closeActionSheet();_submitReport('${msgId}','Reported and blocked by user');_doBlock('${userId}','${jss(name)}',false)">Report & Block</button>
    <button class="action-sheet-btn action-sheet-cancel" onclick="closeActionSheet()">Cancel</button>
  </div>`;
  sheet.addEventListener('click', closeActionSheet);
  document.body.appendChild(sheet);
  requestAnimationFrame(() => sheet.classList.add('open'));
}

function msgMenuConfirmUnsend(msgId) {
  dbg('[MENU] msgMenuConfirmUnsend', msgId);

'<img src="' + esc(u.avatar_url) + '">' : '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" style="width:24px;height:24px;color:var(--color-disabled)"><circle cx="12" cy="6" r="4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M20 17.5C20 19.9853 20 22 12 22C4 22 4 19.9853 4 17.5C4 15.0147 7.58172 13 12 13C16.4183 13 20 15.0147 20 17.5Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg>'}
      </div>

      <div class="profile-field" style="width:100%">

let _editDisplaynameTimer = null;

function onEditDisplayNameInput() {
  dbg('[PROFILE] onEditDisplayNameInput');
  updateEditPreview();
  clearTimeout(_editDisplaynameTimer);
  const val = document.getElementById('edit-displayname').value.trim();
  const status = document.getElementById('edit-displayname-status');
  const hint = document.getElementById('edit-displayname-hint');
  if (!val) {
    status.textContent = '';
    hint.textContent = 'Shown in chat instead of username';
    hint.className = 'field-hint';
    document.getElementById('edit-displayname').classList.remove('valid');
    return;
  }
  if (val.length < 2) { status.textContent = ''; hint.textContent = '2-30 characters'; hint.className = 'field-hint err'; document.getElementById('edit-displayname').classList.remove('valid'); return; }
  status.textContent = '...';
  status.className = 'field-status';
  _editDisplaynameTimer = setTimeout(async () => {
    try {
      const r = await api('/check-name?name=' + encodeURIComponent(val));
      if (document.getElementById('edit-displayname')?.value.trim() !== val) return;
      const inp = document.getElementById('edit-displayname');
      inp.classList.toggle('valid', r.available);
      status.textContent = r.available ? 'ok' : '';
      status.className = 'field-status ' + (r.available ? 'ok' : 'err');
      hint.textContent = r.available ? 'Looks good' : r.reason;
      hint.className = 'field-hint' + (r.available ? '' : ' err');
    } catch { status.textContent = ''; }
  }, 400);
}
