const FLAG = (cc) => cc ? String.fromCodePoint(...[...cc.toUpperCase()].map(c => 0x1F1E6 + c.charCodeAt(0) - 65)) : '';

let _profileAvatarUrl = '';

let _selectedCountry = '';

let _usernameOk = false;
let _usernameTimer = null;

function renderProfilePrompt() {
  dbg('renderProfilePrompt');
  _selectedCountry = currentUser?.country || '';
  _usernameOk = !!(currentUser?.username);
  const countryDisplay = _selectedCountry ? FLAG(_selectedCountry) + ' ' + (COUNTRIES.find(c => c[0] === _selectedCountry)?.[1] || '') : '';
  document.getElementById('app').innerHTML = `
    <div class="profile-prompt">
      <h2>Set up your profile</h2>
      <div class="avatar-upload" id="avatar-upload" onclick="uploadAvatar()">
        ${currentUser?.avatar_url ? '<img src="' + esc(currentUser.avatar_url) + '">' : '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="6" r="4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M20 17.5C20 19.9853 20 22 12 22C4 22 4 19.9853 4 17.5C4 15.0147 7.58172 13 12 13C16.4183 13 20 15.0147 20 17.5Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg>'}
      </div>
      <div class="avatar-zoom" id="avatar-zoom"><span>-</span><div class="avatar-zoom-track" id="avatar-zoom-track"><div class="avatar-zoom-thumb hidden" id="avatar-zoom-thumb"></div></div><span>+</span></div>
      <div class="profile-field">
        <input id="username-input" placeholder="Username" maxlength="20" value="${currentUser?.username || ''}" oninput="onUsernameInput()" autocomplete="off" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" spellcheck="false">
        <span class="field-status" id="username-status"></span>
        <div class="field-hint" id="username-hint">Allowed: a-z 0-9 . _ -</div>
      </div>
      <div class="profile-field">
        <input id="displayname-input" placeholder="Display name (optional)" maxlength="30" value="${currentUser?.display_name || ''}" oninput="onDisplayNameInput()" autocomplete="off" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" spellcheck="false">
        <span class="field-status" id="displayname-status"></span>
        <div class="field-hint" id="displayname-hint">Shown in chat instead of username</div>
      </div>
      <div class="country-picker" id="country-picker">
        <input id="country-input" placeholder="Country" value="${countryDisplay}" onfocus="openCountryPicker()" autocomplete="off">
        <span class="field-status" id="country-status"></span>
        <div class="country-list" id="country-list"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="profile-preview" id="profile-preview">
        <div class="profile-preview-label">How others will see your messages</div>
        <div id="preview-bubble"></div>
      </div>
      <button onclick="submitProfile()">Continue</button>
    </div>`;
  _profileAvatarUrl = currentUser?.avatar_url || '';
  document.getElementById('username-input').focus();
  updateProfilePreview();
}

function onUsernameInput() {
  dbg('[PROFILE] onUsernameInput');
  clearTimeout(_usernameTimer);
  _usernameOk = false;
  const status = document.getElementById('username-status');
  const hint = document.getElementById('username-hint');
  const val = document.getElementById('username-input').value;
  if (!val || val.length < 2) {
    status.textContent = '';
    hint.textContent = 'Allowed: a-z 0-9 . _ -';
    hint.className = 'field-hint';
    updateProfilePreview();
    return;
  }
  status.textContent = '...';
  status.className = 'field-status';
  _usernameTimer = setTimeout(async () => {
    try {
      const r = await api('/check-username?name=' + encodeURIComponent(val));
      if (document.getElementById('username-input').value !== val) return;
      _usernameOk = r.available;
      const inp = document.getElementById('username-input');
      inp.classList.toggle('valid', r.available);
      status.textContent = r.available ? 'ok' : '';
      status.className = 'field-status ' + (r.available ? 'ok' : 'err');
      hint.textContent = r.available ? 'Available' : r.reason;
      hint.className = 'field-hint' + (r.available ? '' : ' err');
    } catch { status.textContent = ''; }
    updateProfilePreview();
  }, 400);
}

let _displaynameTimer = null;

function onDisplayNameInput() {
  dbg('[PROFILE] onDisplayNameInput');
  clearTimeout(_displaynameTimer);
  updateProfilePreview();
  const val = document.getElementById('displayname-input').value.trim();
  const status = document.getElementById('displayname-status');
  const hint = document.getElementById('displayname-hint');
  if (!val) {
    status.textContent = '';
    hint.textContent = 'Shown in chat instead of username';
    hint.className = 'field-hint';
    return;
  }
  if (val.length < 2) { status.textContent = ''; hint.textContent = 'At least 2 characters'; hint.className = 'field-hint err'; return; }
  status.textContent = '...';
  status.className = 'field-status';
  _displaynameTimer = setTimeout(async () => {
    try {
      const r = await api('/check-name?name=' + encodeURIComponent(val));
      if (document.getElementById('displayname-input').value.trim() !== val) return;
      const inp = document.getElementById('displayname-input');
      inp.classList.toggle('valid', r.available);
      status.textContent = r.available ? 'ok' : '';
      status.className = 'field-status ' + (r.available ? 'ok' : 'err');
      hint.textContent = r.available ? 'Looks good' : r.reason;
      hint.className = 'field-hint' + (r.available ? '' : ' err');
    } catch { status.textContent = ''; }
  }, 400);
}

let _previewAvatarUrl = '';

function updateProfilePreview() {
  dbg('[PROFILE] updateProfilePreview');
  const el = document.getElementById('preview-bubble');
  if (!el) return;
  const username = document.getElementById('username-input')?.value || '';
  const displayName = document.getElementById('displayname-input')?.value || '';
  const shown = displayName || username || 'username';
  const color = USER_COLORS[currentUser?.color_index || 0];
  const avatarEl = _previewAvatarUrl
    ? `<div class="avatar-sm"><img src="${_previewAvatarUrl}" style="width:100%;height:100%;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover"></div>`
    : `<div class="avatar-sm" style="background:${color.vivid}">${(shown[0] || '?').toUpperCase()}</div>`;
  el.innerHTML = `<div class="msg msg-other">
    ${avatarEl}
    <div class="msg-bubble msg-other-bubble" style="background:${color.pastel}">
      <div class="msg-header">
        <span class="msg-name" style="color:${color.vivid}">${escapeHtml(shown)}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="msg-text">Hey, see you at the main stage!</div>
      <span class="msg-time">now</span>
    </div>
  </div>`;
}

function openCountryPicker() {
  dbg('[PROFILE] openCountryPicker');
  const picker = document.getElementById('country-picker');
  if (picker.classList.contains('open')) return;
  picker.classList.add('open');
  const input = document.getElementById('country-input');
  input.readOnly = false;
  input.value = '';
  input.placeholder = 'Search country...';
  input.focus();
  let _hlIdx = 0;
  renderCountryList('', 0);
  input.oninput = () => { _hlIdx = 0; renderCountryList(input.value, _hlIdx); };
  input.onkeydown = (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape') { closeCountryPicker(); return; }
    const items = document.querySelectorAll('.country-item[data-code]');
    if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') { e.preventDefault(); _hlIdx = Math.min(_hlIdx + 1, items.length - 1); highlightCountryItem(items, _hlIdx); }
    else if (e.key === 'ArrowUp') { e.preventDefault(); _hlIdx = Math.max(_hlIdx - 1, 0); highlightCountryItem(items, _hlIdx); }
    else if (e.key === 'Enter') { e.preventDefault(); if (items[_hlIdx]) items[_hlIdx].click(); }
  };
  setTimeout(() => document.addEventListener('click', _countryOutsideClick), 10);
}

function _countryOutsideClick(e) {
  if (!e.target.closest('#country-picker')) closeCountryPicker();
}

function closeCountryPicker() {
  dbg('[PROFILE] closeCountryPicker');
  const picker = document.getElementById('country-picker');
  if (!picker) return;
  picker.classList.remove('open');
  const input = document.getElementById('country-input');
  input.readOnly = true;
  input.placeholder = 'Select country';
  input.oninput = null;
  input.onkeydown = null;
  if (_selectedCountry) {
    const name = COUNTRIES.find(c => c[0] === _selectedCountry)?.[1] || '';
    input.value = FLAG(_selectedCountry) + ' ' + name;
  } else {
    input.value = '';
  }
  document.removeEventListener('click', _countryOutsideClick);
}

function renderCountryList(query, hlIdx) {
  const list = document.getElementById('country-list');
  if (!list) return;
  const q = query.toLowerCase();
  const matchStart = (haystack, needle) => haystack.toLowerCase().startsWith(needle) || haystack.split(/[\s-]+/).some(w => w.toLowerCase().startsWith(needle));
  const filtered = COUNTRIES.filter(([code, name, alt]) => matchStart(name, q) || code.toLowerCase() === q || (alt && q.length >= 3 && alt.split(/\s+/).some(w => w.toLowerCase().startsWith(q))));
  list.innerHTML = filtered.map(([code, name], i) =>
    `<div class="country-item${i === (hlIdx || 0) ? ' highlighted' : ''}" data-code="${code}" onclick="selectCountry('${code}')"><span class="flag">${FLAG(code)}</span>${escapeHtml(name)}</div>`
  ).join('') || '<div class="country-item" style="color:var(--color-muted)">No results</div>';
}

function highlightCountryItem(items, idx) {
  items.forEach((el, i) => el.classList.toggle('highlighted', i === idx));
  if (items[idx]) items[idx].scrollIntoView({ block: 'nearest' });
}

function selectCountry(code) {
  dbg('[PROFILE] selectCountry', code);
  _selectedCountry = code;
  closeCountryPicker();
  const inp = document.getElementById('country-input');
  if (inp) inp.classList.toggle('valid', !!code);
  const status = document.getElementById('country-status');
  if (status) { status.textContent = code ? 'ok' : ''; status.className = 'field-status' + (code ? ' ok' : ''); }
}

let _avatarState = null;

function uploadAvatar() {
  dbg('[AVATAR] uploadAvatar');
  const input = document.createElement('input');
  input.type = 'file'; input.accept = 'image/*';
  input.onchange = async () => {
    const file = input.files[0];
    if (!file) return;
    const bmp = await createImageBitmap(file);
    if (bmp.width < 128 || bmp.height < 128) { bmp.close(); showToast('Image must be at least 128x128'); return; }
    bmp.close();
    initAvatarEditor(file);
  };
  input.click();
}

async function initAvatarEditor(file) {
  dbg('[AVATAR] initAvatarEditor', file.name, file.size);
  const bmp = await createImageBitmap(file);
  const origW = bmp.width, origH = bmp.height;
  bmp.close();

  let previewFile = file;
  let natW = origW, natH = origH;
  const maxPreview = 2000;
  if (origW > maxPreview || origH > maxPreview) {
    const scale = maxPreview / Math.max(origW, origH);
    natW = Math.round(origW * scale);
    natH = Math.round(origH * scale);
    const resized = await createImageBitmap(file, { resizeWidth: natW, resizeHeight: natH, resizeQuality: 'high' });
    const blob = await _bitmapToBlob(resized, natW, natH);
    previewFile = new File([blob], 'preview.webp', { type: 'image/webp' });
  }

  const previewScale = origW / natW;
  const minScale = 128 / Math.min(natW, natH);
  const maxScale = Math.max(minScale * 6, 1);
  const initScale = minScale * 2;
  _avatarState = { file, previewFile, natW, natH, origW, origH, previewScale, scale: initScale, minScale, maxScale, x: 0, y: 0 };
  _avatarState.x = -(natW * initScale - 128) / 2;
  _avatarState.y = -(natH * initScale - 128) / 2;

  const url = URL.createObjectURL(previewFile);
  const el = document.getElementById('avatar-upload');
  el.innerHTML = `
    <div class="avatar-edit" id="avatar-edit">
      <img src="${url}" id="avatar-edit-img">
    </div>`;
  let _avatarDragged = false;
  el.onclick = () => { if (!_avatarDragged) uploadAvatar(); };

  const thumb = document.getElementById('avatar-zoom-thumb');
  const track = document.getElementById('avatar-zoom-track');
  thumb.classList.remove('hidden');
  const initT = (initScale - minScale) / (maxScale - minScale);
  thumb.style.left = (initT * 86) + 'px';

  let zLastX, zCurrentLeft;
  const zMove = (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const cx = e.touches ? e.touches[0].clientX : e.clientX;
    zCurrentLeft += (cx - zLastX) * 0.4;
    zLastX = cx;
    const newLeft = Math.max(0, Math.min(86, zCurrentLeft));
    thumb.style.left = newLeft + 'px';
    const t = newLeft / 86;
    const s = _avatarState;
    const oldScale = s.scale;
    s.scale = s.minScale + t * (s.maxScale - s.minScale);
    const ratio = s.scale / oldScale;
    s.x = clampAvatarX(64 - (64 - s.x) * ratio);
    s.y = clampAvatarY(64 - (64 - s.y) * ratio);
    updateAvatarView();
  };
  const zUp = () => { document.removeEventListener('mousemove', zMove); document.removeEventListener('mouseup', zUp); document.removeEventListener('touchmove', zMove); document.removeEventListener('touchend', zUp); };
  thumb.onmousedown = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); zLastX = e.clientX; zCurrentLeft = parseFloat(thumb.style.left); document.addEventListener('mousemove', zMove); document.addEventListener('mouseup', zUp); };
  thumb.ontouchstart = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); zLastX = e.touches[0].clientX; zCurrentLeft = parseFloat(thumb.style.left); document.addEventListener('touchmove', zMove, { passive: false }); document.addEventListener('touchend', zUp); };

  updateAvatarView();

  const edit = document.getElementById('avatar-edit');
  let startX, startY, origX, origY;
  const onMove = (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    _avatarDragged = true;
    const cx = e.touches ? e.touches[0].clientX : e.clientX;
    const cy = e.touches ? e.touches[0].clientY : e.clientY;
    const s = _avatarState;
    s.x = clampAvatarX(origX + (cx - startX));
    s.y = clampAvatarY(origY + (cy - startY));
    updateAvatarView();
  };
  const onUp = () => { document.removeEventListener('mousemove', onMove); document.removeEventListener('mouseup', onUp); document.removeEventListener('touchmove', onMove); document.removeEventListener('touchend', onUp); setTimeout(() => { _avatarDragged = false; }, 10); };
  edit.onmousedown = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); _avatarDragged = false; startX = e.clientX; startY = e.clientY; origX = _avatarState.x; origY = _avatarState.y; document.addEventListener('mousemove', onMove); document.addEventListener('mouseup', onUp); };
  edit.ontouchstart = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); _avatarDragged = false; startX = e.touches[0].clientX; startY = e.touches[0].clientY; origX = _avatarState.x; origY = _avatarState.y; document.addEventListener('touchmove', onMove, { passive: false }); document.addEventListener('touchend', function onTouchUp() { document.removeEventListener('touchmove', onMove); document.removeEventListener('touchend', onTouchUp); if (!_avatarDragged) uploadAvatar(); setTimeout(() => { _avatarDragged = false; }, 10); }); };
}

function clampAvatarX(x) { const s = _avatarState; return Math.min(0, Math.max(x, 128 - s.natW * s.scale)); }
function clampAvatarY(y) { const s = _avatarState; return Math.min(0, Math.max(y, 128 - s.natH * s.scale)); }

let _avatarPreviewTimer = null;

function updateAvatarView() {
  const img = document.getElementById('avatar-edit-img');
  if (!img || !_avatarState) return;
  const s = _avatarState;
  img.style.width = (s.natW * s.scale) + 'px';
  img.style.height = (s.natH * s.scale) + 'px';
  img.style.transform = `translate3d(${s.x}px, ${s.y}px, 0)`;
  clearTimeout(_avatarPreviewTimer);
  _avatarPreviewTimer = setTimeout(updateAvatarPreview, 400);
}

async function updateAvatarPreview() {
  dbg('[AVATAR] updateAvatarPreview');
  const s = _avatarState;
  if (!s) return;
  const cropX = -s.x / s.scale;
  const cropY = -s.y / s.scale;
  const cropSize = 128 / s.scale;
  try {
    const bmp = await createImageBitmap(s.previewFile, cropX, cropY, cropSize, cropSize, { resizeWidth: 128, resizeHeight: 128, resizeQuality: 'high' });
    const blob = await _bitmapToBlob(bmp, 128, 128);
    if (_previewAvatarUrl) URL.revokeObjectURL(_previewAvatarUrl);
    _previewAvatarUrl = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    updateProfilePreview();
  } catch (e) { dbg('[AVATAR] preview render failed', e.message); }
}

async function submitAvatarCrop() {
  dbg('[AVATAR] submitAvatarCrop');
  const s = _avatarState;
  if (!s) return null;
  const cropX = (-s.x / s.scale) * s.previewScale;
  const cropY = (-s.y / s.scale) * s.previewScale;
  const cropSize = (128 / s.scale) * s.previewScale;

  const bmp = await createImageBitmap(s.file, cropX, cropY, cropSize, cropSize, { resizeWidth: 128, resizeHeight: 128, resizeQuality: 'high' });
  const blob = await _bitmapToBlob(bmp, 128, 128);

  const form = new FormData();
  form.append('file', new File([blob], 'avatar.webp', { type: 'image/webp' }));
  const resp = await fetch(API + '/upload/avatar', { method: 'POST', body: form, credentials: 'include' });
  if (!resp.ok) throw new Error('Upload failed');
  const result = await resp.json();
  _profileAvatarUrl = result.url;
  dbg('[PROFILE] avatar uploaded:', result.url);
  return result.url;
}

async function submitProfile() {
  dbg('[PROFILE] submitProfile');
  const username = document.getElementById('username-input').value.trim();
  const displayName = document.getElementById('displayname-input').value.trim();
  const country = _selectedCountry;
  if (!username || username.length < 2) { showToast('Please choose a username'); return; }
  if (!_usernameOk) { showToast('Username not available'); return; }
  if (!country) { showToast('Please select your country'); return; }
  if (!_avatarState && !_profileAvatarUrl) { showToast('Please upload a profile photo'); return; }
  try {
    if (_avatarState) {
      showToast('Processing photo...');
      await submitAvatarCrop();
    }
    const body = { username, country, avatar_url: _profileAvatarUrl };
    if (displayName) body.display_name = displayName;
    await api('/profile', {
      method: 'PUT',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify(body),
    });
    currentUser.username = username;
    currentUser.display_name = displayName;
    currentUser.country = country;
    currentUser.avatar_url = _profileAvatarUrl;
    await connectWS();
    await loadBlockedUsers();
    await loadRooms();
    if (rooms.length === 1) {
      openRoom(rooms[0].id, rooms[0].name, rooms[0].type);
    } else {
      renderRoomList();
    }
  } catch (e) { showToast(e.message); }
}

// --- WebSocket ---
let _wsConnecting = false;
let _wsRetries = 0;
function connectWS() {
  dbg('[WS] connectWS');
  return new Promise((resolve) => {
    if (_wsConnecting) { resolve(); return; }
    _wsConnecting = true;
    if (ws) { try { ws.onclose = null; ws.close(); } catch (e) { /* already closed */ } }
    const proto = location.protocol === 'https:' ? 'wss' : 'ws';
    const token = document.cookie.split(';').map(c => c.trim()).find(c => c.startsWith('chat_session='));
    if (!token) { _wsConnecting = false; resolve(); return; }
    const sock = new WebSocket(`${proto}://${location.host}/ws/chat/${token.split('=')[1]}`);
    const done = () => { _wsConnecting = false; resolve(); };
    sock.onopen = () => {
      ws = sock;
      _wsRetries = 0;
      if (currentRoom) wsSend('join_room', { room_id: currentRoom });
      done();
    };
    sock.onmessage = (e) => {
      try {
        const data = JSON.parse(e.data);
        handleWSEvent(data).catch((err) => dbg('[WS] event handler error:', err));
      } catch (err) { dbg('[WS] event handler error:', err); }
    };
    sock.onclose = (ev) => {
      ws = null; _wsConnecting = false;
      if (ev.code === 4001) { currentUser = null; renderAuth(); return; }
      if (currentUser) {
        _wsRetries++;
        const delay = Math.min(3000 * Math.pow(1.5, _wsRetries - 1), 30000);
        dbg('[WS] reconnecting in', Math.round(delay) + 'ms', 'attempt', _wsRetries);
        setTimeout(() => connectWS(), delay);
      }
    };
    sock.onerror = () => { done(); };
    setTimeout(done, 3000);
  });
}

function wsSend(event, payload) {
  if (ws && ws.readyState === 1) ws.send(JSON.stringify({ event, ...payload }));
}

// --- E2EE message helpers (Phase 2) ---
function _isE2eeContent(content) {
  try {
    const c = JSON.parse(content);
    return !!(c && c.e2ee === true);
  } catch (e) {
    return false;
  }
}

function _genDeviceId() {
  const bytes = crypto.getRandomValues(new Uint8Array(16));
  return Array.from(bytes, b => b.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')).join('');
}

function _b64FromParts(iv, bytes) {
  const combined = new Uint8Array(iv.length + bytes.length);
  combined.set(iv, 0);
  combined.set(bytes, iv.length);
  let bin = '';
  for (let i = 0; i < combined.length; i++) bin += String.fromCharCode(combined[i]);
  return btoa(bin);
}

function _partsFromB64(b64) {
  const bin = atob(b64);
  const combined = new Uint8Array(bin.length);
  for (let i = 0; i < bin.length; i++) combined[i] = bin.charCodeAt(i);
  return { iv: combined.slice(0, 12), data: combined.slice(12) };
}

function _getDmPeerUserId(roomId) {
  const members = membersByRoom[roomId];
  if (members && members.length) {
    const peer = members.find(m => m.user_id !== currentUser?.id);
    if (peer) return peer.user_id;
  }
  if (_pendingDmTarget && (roomId === currentRoom || roomId === 'pending-dm')) return _pendingDmTarget;
  if (_dmListCache[roomId]) return _dmListCache[roomId];
  return null;
}

function _waitForMembers(roomId, timeoutMs) {
  if (membersByRoom[roomId] && membersByRoom[roomId].length) return Promise.resolve(true);
  return new Promise((resolve) => {
    const deadline = Date.now() + timeoutMs;
    const check = () => {
      if (membersByRoom[roomId] && membersByRoom[roomId].length) { resolve(true); return; }
      if (Date.now() >= deadline) { resolve(false); return; }
      setTimeout(check, 100);
    };
    check();
  });
}

function _sentinel(msg) {
  msg.content = JSON.stringify({ text: '[Encrypted message]' });
  msg._decryptFailed = true;
  return msg;
}

async function _validateDecryptedMedia(msg, plaintext) {
  if (msg.type !== 'image' && msg.type !== 'video') return true;
  let inner = null;
  try { inner = JSON.parse(plaintext); } catch (e) { inner = null; }
  if (!inner || !_UPLOAD_URL_RE.test(inner.url || '')) {
    dbg('[E2EE] decrypted media URL failed validation, room=' + msg.room_id);
    return false;
  }
  return true;
}

async function _decryptV2(msg, parsed, envelope) {
  const myWrapped = parsed.keys[E2EE._deviceId];
  if (!myWrapped) {
    // A missing slot is deterministic (device predates or postdates the
    // message, or the sender device was pruned) -- not a stale-cache
    // condition, so no retry.
    dbg('[E2EE] no key slot for this device, msg=' + msg.id + ' sender=' + msg.user_id);
    _sentinel(msg);
    msg._noSlot = true;
    return msg;
  }
  try {
    const senderDevices = await E2EE.getDeviceList(msg.user_id);
    if (!senderDevices) throw new Error('sender has no device keys');
    const senderDevice = senderDevices.find(d => d.device_id === parsed.sd);
    if (!senderDevice) throw new Error('sender device ' + parsed.sd + ' not found');
    const kek = await E2EE.getKek(msg.room_id, msg.user_id, parsed.sd, senderDevice.publicKey);
    const wrapped = _partsFromB64(myWrapped);
    const mkBuf = await crypto.subtle.decrypt({ name: 'AES-GCM', iv: wrapped.iv }, kek, wrapped.data);
    const mkKey = await crypto.subtle.importKey('raw', mkBuf, { name: 'AES-GCM' }, false, ['decrypt']);
    const body = _partsFromB64(parsed.ct);
    const plainBuf = await crypto.subtle.decrypt({ name: 'AES-GCM', iv: body.iv }, mkKey, body.data);
    const plaintext = new TextDecoder().decode(plainBuf);
    if (!(await _validateDecryptedMedia(msg, plaintext))) {
      _sentinel(msg);
      _roomEncrypted.add(msg.room_id);
      return msg;
    }
    msg.content = plaintext;
    _roomEncrypted.add(msg.room_id);
  } catch (e) {
    dbg('[E2EE] v2 decrypt failed:', e && e.message);
    if (msg.id != null && !_decryptRetried.has(msg.id)) {
      _decryptRetried.add(msg.id);
      // Sender may have re-keyed the same device_id -- invalidate the
      // sender's device list and all derived KEKs, then retry once.
      dbg('[E2EE] retry guard: invalidating device list + keks, retrying once, msg=' + msg.id);
      delete E2EE._deviceLists[msg.user_id];
      E2EE._keks = {};
      msg.content = envelope;
      return _decryptMessageContent(msg);
    }
    _sentinel(msg);
  }
  return msg;
}

async function _decryptV1Legacy(msg, parsed, envelope) {
  // v1 envelopes can only exist inside the TTL window at deploy time. The
  // server's key endpoint now returns the v2 devices shape (no public_key
  // field), so this path must NEVER fetch -- it only ever uses a peer key
  // cached by a pre-deploy tab that never reloaded. On any fresh page load
  // this cache is empty and every v1 envelope renders the sentinel below.
  const peerUserId = _getDmPeerUserId(msg.room_id);
  const cachedPeerKey = peerUserId && E2EE._legacyPeerKeys[peerUserId];
  if (!cachedPeerKey || !parsed || !parsed.ct) {
    dbg('[E2EE] v1 envelope with no cached pre-deploy peer key, sentinel, msg=' + msg.id);
    return _sentinel(msg);
  }
  try {
    const key = await E2EE._deriveSharedKeyV1(cachedPeerKey, msg.room_id);
    const body = _partsFromB64(parsed.ct);
    const plainBuf = await crypto.subtle.decrypt({ name: 'AES-GCM', iv: body.iv }, key, body.data);
    const plaintext = new TextDecoder().decode(plainBuf);
    if (!(await _validateDecryptedMedia(msg, plaintext))) {
      _roomEncrypted.add(msg.room_id);
      return _sentinel(msg);
    }
    msg.content = plaintext;
    _roomEncrypted.add(msg.room_id);
  } catch (e) {
    dbg('[E2EE] v1 legacy decrypt failed:', e && e.message);
    return _sentinel(msg);
  }
  return msg;
}

async function _decryptMessageContent(msg) {
  if (!_isE2eeContent(msg.content)) return msg;
  const envelope = msg.content;
  let parsed;
  try { parsed = JSON.parse(envelope); } catch (e) { parsed = null; }
  if (parsed && parsed.keys && typeof parsed.keys === 'object') {
    return _decryptV2(msg, parsed, envelope);
  }
  return _decryptV1Legacy(msg, parsed, envelope);
}

function _rebuildReplySnippet(msg, roomMsgs) {
  if (!msg.reply_to || msg.reply_to.text) return;
  const ref = (roomMsgs || []).find(m => m.id === msg.reply_to.id);
  if (!ref) {
    msg.reply_to = { ...msg.reply_to, text: 'Encrypted message' };
    return;
  }
  let text = '';
  try { text = JSON.parse(ref.content).text || ''; } catch (e) { text = ''; }
  msg.reply_to = { ...msg.reply_to, text };
}

async function handleWSEvent(data) {
  dbg('ws event:', data.event, data.room_id || data.message_id || '');
  switch (data.event) {
    case 'room_history':
      if (data.members) membersByRoom[data.room_id] = data.members;
      data.messages = await Promise.all(data.messages.map(m => _decryptMessageContent(m)));
      data.messages.forEach(m => _rebuildReplySnippet(m, data.messages));
      messagesByRoom[data.room_id] = data.messages;
      onlineByRoom[data.room_id] = data.online;
      if (currentUser && !data.online.find(u => u.user_id === currentUser.id))
        onlineByRoom[data.room_id].push({ user_id: currentUser.id, display_name: currentUser.display_name, username: currentUser.username, color_index: currentUser.color_index, avatar_url: currentUser.avatar_url, country: currentUser.country });
      verify('room_history', data.messages, data.messages.length + ' messages for ' + data.room_id);
      dbg('[CHAT] room_history received, room=' + data.room_id + ' currentRoom=' + currentRoom + ' msgs=' + data.messages.length);
      if (currentRoom === data.room_id) {
        renderMessages();
        _setupReadObserver();
        if (window._pendingScrollMsg) {
          var _sm = window._pendingScrollMsg; window._pendingScrollMsg = null;
          dbg('[SCROLL] pending scroll to message', _sm);
          setTimeout(function() { scrollToMessage(_sm); }, 200);
        } else {
          const unreadCount = unreadByRoom[data.room_id] || 0;
          if (unreadCount > 0 && data.messages.length > 0) {
            const otherMsgs = data.messages.filter(m => m.user_id !== currentUser?.id);
            const firstUnreadIdx = Math.max(0, otherMsgs.length - unreadCount);
            const firstUnread = otherMsgs[firstUnreadIdx];
            if (firstUnread) {
              dbg('[SCROLL] scrolling to first unread', firstUnread.id, 'unread=' + unreadCount);
              const target = document.querySelector(`[data-msg-id="${firstUnread.id}"]`);
              if (target) target.scrollIntoView({ block: 'start' });
              else scrollToBottom();
            } else { scrollToBottom(); }
          } else { scrollToBottom(); }
        }
        updateHeaderCount();
        renderMemberList();
      }
      if (window._roomHistoryResolve) { window._roomHistoryResolve(); window._roomHistoryResolve = null; }
      updateSidebarCount(data.room_id);
      break;
    case 'message': {
      const _wasE2ee = _isE2eeContent(data.content);
      await _decryptMessageContent(data);
      _rebuildReplySnippet(data, messagesByRoom[data.room_id] || []);
      if (!messagesByRoom[data.room_id]) messagesByRoom[data.room_id] = [];
      if (messagesByRoom[data.room_id].some(m => m.id === data.id)) break;
      messagesByRoom[data.room_id].push(data);
      if (currentRoom === data.room_id) {
        const scrollEl = document.getElementById('msg-scroll');
        const wasAtBottom = scrollEl && (scrollEl.scrollTop + scrollEl.clientHeight >= scrollEl.scrollHeight - 50);
        appendMessage(data);
        if (wasAtBottom) scrollToBottom();
      }
      if (document.hidden && data.user_id !== currentUser?.id) {
        _hiddenUnread = (_hiddenUnread || 0) + 1;
        _updateTitleBadge();
        if (Notification.permission === 'granted') {
          let preview = '';
          if (_wasE2ee) { preview = 'Sent you a message'; }
          else if (data.type === 'text') { try { preview = JSON.parse(data.content).text || ''; } catch { preview = data.content; } }
          else if (data.type === 'image') preview = 'Sent a photo';
          else if (data.type === 'video') preview = 'Sent a video';
          else if (data.type === 'location') preview = 'Shared a location';
          const rl = roomTypeLookup[data.room_id] || {};
          _queueBrowserNotification({
            room_id: data.room_id, type: rl.type || 'general', name: rl.name || '',
            sender_name: data.display_name, preview: preview.slice(0, 100), msg_id: data.id,
          });
        }
      }
      break;
    }
    case 'message_acked': {
      const _ackRoom = data.room_id || currentRoom;
      const msgs = messagesByRoom[_ackRoom] || [];
      const idx = msgs.findIndex(m => m.temp_id === data.temp_id);
      if (idx !== -1) {
        msgs[idx].id = data.id;
        msgs[idx].created_at = data.created_at;
        msgs[idx].pending = false;
        const el = document.querySelector(`[data-msg-id="${data.temp_id}"]`);
        if (el) { el.setAttribute('data-msg-id', data.id); el.classList.remove('msg-pending'); }
        verify('message_acked', el, 'pending→confirmed temp_id=' + data.temp_id + ' → id=' + data.id);
        const room = rooms.find(r => r.id === _ackRoom);
        if (room && !room.is_member) {
          room.is_member = true;
          const bell = document.querySelector(`.room-item[data-room-id="${_ackRoom}"] .room-bell`);
          if (bell) { bell.classList.add('active'); bell.querySelector('svg')?.setAttribute('fill', 'currentColor'); }
        }
      } else {
        dbg('[WS] message_acked ignored (sent from another device)');
      }
      break;
    }
    case 'message_removed': {
      const msgs2 = messagesByRoom[data.room_id] || [];
      const idx2 = msgs2.findIndex(m => m.id === data.id);
      if (idx2 !== -1) msgs2.splice(idx2, 1);
      const removedEl = document.querySelector(`[data-msg-id="${data.id}"]`);
      removedEl?.remove();
      if (replyTo && replyTo.id === data.id) cancelReply();
      if (data.user_id !== currentUser?.id) showToast(data.reason || 'Message removed');
      break;
    }
    case 'messages_expired':
      if (messagesByRoom[data.room_id]) {
        const ids = new Set(data.message_ids);
        messagesByRoom[data.room_id] = messagesByRoom[data.room_id].filter(m => !ids.has(m.id));
        if (currentRoom === data.room_id) renderMessages();
      }
      break;
    case 'muted':
      dbg('[WS] muted:', data.reason);
      showToast(data.message || data.reason || 'You have been muted');
      break;
    case 'typing':
      if (!typingUsers[data.room_id]) typingUsers[data.room_id] = {};
      if (data.active) {
        typingUsers[data.room_id][data.user_id] = true;
        setTimeout(() => {
          if (typingUsers[data.room_id]?.[data.user_id]) {
            delete typingUsers[data.room_id][data.user_id];
            if (currentRoom === data.room_id) updateTypingIndicator();
          }
        }, 5000);
      } else delete typingUsers[data.room_id][data.user_id];
      if (currentRoom === data.room_id) updateTypingIndicator();
      break;
    case 'presence':
      if (!onlineByRoom[data.room_id]) onlineByRoom[data.room_id] = [];
      if (data.online) {
        if (!onlineByRoom[data.room_id].find(u => u.user_id === data.user_id))
          onlineByRoom[data.room_id].push({ user_id: data.user_id, display_name: data.display_name, username: data.username, color_index: data.color_index, avatar_url: data.avatar_url, country: data.country });
      } else {
        onlineByRoom[data.room_id] = onlineByRoom[data.room_id].filter(u => u.user_id !== data.user_id);
      }
      updateSidebarCount(data.room_id);
      if (data.room_id === currentRoom) { updateHeaderCount(); renderMemberItems(); }
      break;
    case 'rooms_changed':
      dbg('[ROOM] rooms_changed, reloading');
      loadRooms().then(() => {
        renderRoomItems();
        if (currentRoom) {
          const still = rooms.find(r => r.id === currentRoom);
          if (!still) {
            const main = rooms.find(r => r.is_main) || rooms[0];
            if (main) openRoom(main.id, main.name, main.type);
            else { currentRoom = null; renderRoomList(); }
          } else {
            if (still.name !== currentRoomName) {
              currentRoomName = still.name;
              const hdr = document.querySelector('.header .title');
              if (hdr) hdr.textContent = still.name;
            }
            updateHeaderCount();
          }
        }
      });
      break;
    case 'message_rejected':
      showToast(data.reason);
      if (data.temp_id) {
        const msgs = messagesByRoom[currentRoom] || [];
        const idx = msgs.findIndex(m => m.temp_id === data.temp_id || m.id === data.temp_id);
        if (idx !== -1) msgs.splice(idx, 1);
        const el = document.querySelector(`[data-msg-id="${data.temp_id}"]`);
        if (el) el.remove();
      }
      break;
    case 'strike': showToast(`Warning (${data.count}/3): ${data.reason}`); break;
    case 'banned': showToast('You have been banned: ' + data.reason); currentUser = null; renderAuth(); break;
    case 'dm_opened':
      dbg('[DM] dm_opened', data.room_id, data.name, data.target_user_id);
      if (data.room_id) {
        if (data.target_user_id) _dmListCache[data.room_id] = data.target_user_id;
        openRoom(data.room_id, data.name || '', 'dm');
      } else {
        _pendingDmTarget = data.target_user_id;
        _pendingDmName = data.name || '';
        openRoom('pending-dm', data.name || '', 'dm');
      }
      break;
    case 'link_preview': {
      dbg('[LINK] preview for', data.message_id);
      const msgs = messagesByRoom[data.room_id] || [];
      const msg = msgs.find(m => m.id === data.message_id);
      if (msg) msg.link_preview = data.link_preview;
      if (data.room_id === currentRoom) {
        const el = document.querySelector(`[data-msg-id="${data.message_id}"] .msg-bubble`);
        if (el && !el.querySelector('.msg-link-preview')) {
          const lp = data.link_preview;
          const textEl = el.querySelector('.msg-text');
          const previewHtml = `<a class="msg-link-preview" href="${esc(lp.url)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
              ${lp.image ? `<img class="link-preview-img" src="${esc(lp.image)}" loading="lazy">` : ''}
              <div class="link-preview-body">
                <div class="link-preview-title">${esc(lp.title || '')}</div>
                ${lp.description ? `<div class="link-preview-desc">${esc(lp.description)}</div>` : ''}
                <div class="link-preview-domain">${esc(lp.domain || '')}</div>
              </div>
            </a>`;
          if (textEl) textEl.insertAdjacentHTML('beforebegin', previewHtml);
          else el.insertAdjacentHTML('afterbegin', previewHtml);
        }
      }
      break;
    }
    case 'report_confirmed': showToast('Report submitted'); break;
    case 'meetup_updated': {
      const mBtn = document.querySelector(`[data-meetup-id="${data.meetup_id}"] .meetup-join-btn`);
      if (mBtn && data.attendees) {
        const count = data.attendees.length;
        const going = data.attendees.some(a => a.id === currentUser?.id);
        mBtn.textContent = going ? 'Joined' : 'Join';
        mBtn.classList.toggle('active', going);
        const countEl = document.querySelector(`[data-meetup-id="${data.meetup_id}"] .meetup-going`);
        if (countEl) countEl.textContent = count + ' going';
      }
      break;
    }
    case 'meetup_expired': {
      const mEl = document.querySelector(`[data-meetup-id="${data.meetup?.id || data.meetup_id}"]`);
      if (mEl) { mEl.style.opacity = '0.5'; mEl.querySelector('.meetup-join-btn')?.remove(); }
      break;
    }
    case 'reaction_updated': {
      const msgs3 = messagesByRoom[currentRoom] || [];
      const target = msgs3.find(m => m.id === data.message_id);
      if (target) target.reactions = data.reactions;
      updateReactionPills(data.message_id, data.reactions);
      break;
    }
    case 'badge_counts':
      dbg('[BADGE] initial counts:', data.counts.length);
      data.counts.forEach(({room_id, count, type, name, last_read_at}) => {
        if (count > 0) unreadByRoom[room_id] = count;
        if (last_read_at) _lastReadByRoom[room_id] = last_read_at;
        roomTypeLookup[room_id] = {type, name};
      });
      refreshAllBadges();
      _updateAppBadge();
      break;
    case 'badge_update':
      dbg('[BADGE] update:', data.room_id, data.count);
      if (data.count > 0 && data.room_id === currentRoom && !document.hidden) {
        // The server now badges every member including active viewers (it
        // cannot know which CONNECTION is looking at the room -- a second
        // device elsewhere must still get its badge). This foreground client
        // is reading the room right now: the message event renders it and
        // the read-observer's mark_read broadcasts the cross-device clear,
        // so applying the badge here would only flash it on the open room.
        dbg('[BADGE] ignoring update for foreground current room', data.room_id);
        break;
      }
      roomTypeLookup[data.room_id] = {type: data.type, name: data.name};
      if (data.count === 0) {
        delete unreadByRoom[data.room_id];
        _hiddenUnread = 0;
      } else {
        unreadByRoom[data.room_id] = data.count;
        if (Notification.permission === 'granted' && document.hidden) _queueBrowserNotification(data);
      }
      if (data.type === 'dm' && !(data.room_id in _dmListCache) && _isDmsTabActive()) {
        // Brand-new DM (created or opened mid-session): the sidebar has
        // never rendered a row for this room, so updateBadge()'s
        // [data-room-id] lookup below is a no-op. Only DMs tab is visible.
        dbg('[DM] badge_update for unseen DM room, refreshing DM list:', data.room_id);
        loadDMs();
      }
      updateBadge(data.room_id);
      updateTabBadges();
      _updateAppBadge();
      break;
    case 'key_rotated':
      dbg('[E2EE] key_rotated for user', data.user_id, 'room', data.room_id);
      // Cache is an optimization only -- always drop the whole device list
      // for this user and clear every derived KEK rather than trying to
      // scan the composite room:user:device keys (the room_id:null self-
      // notification has no room to key on anyway).
      delete E2EE._deviceLists[data.user_id];
      E2EE._keks = {};
      if (data.room_id != null) {
        _unencryptedRooms.delete(data.room_id);
        if (currentRoom === data.room_id) {
          // Room is open: refresh the banner and restore the header lock so a
          // previously-latched unencrypted room shows its true state live.
          renderMessages();
          document.querySelectorAll('.header .title').forEach(t => {
            if (!t.querySelector('.icon-lock')) t.insertAdjacentHTML('afterbegin', ICON_LOCK);
          });
          dbg('[E2EE] key_rotated refreshed open room UI', data.room_id);
        }
      }
      break;
  }
}

// --- Room List ---
let _roomRefreshTimer = null;
function _debouncedRoomRefresh() {
  if (_roomRefreshTimer) return;
  _roomRefreshTimer = setTimeout(() => {
    _roomRefreshTimer = null;
    loadRooms().then(() => {
      renderRoomItems();
      if (currentRoom) updateHeaderCount();
    });
  }, 500);
}

async function loadBlockedUsers() {
  try {
    const list = await api('/blocks');
    blockedUserIds = new Set(list.map(u => u.user_id));
    dbg('[BLOCK] loaded', blockedUserIds.size, 'blocked users');
  } catch { blockedUserIds = new Set(); }
}

async function loadRooms() {
  dbg('[ROOM] loadRooms');
  try { rooms = await api('/rooms'); } catch { rooms = []; }
  verify('loadRooms', rooms.length > 0, rooms.length + ' rooms loaded');
  // GET /rooms only ever returns stage/general rooms -- merge instead of
  // replacing roomTypeLookup, and only prune stage/general entries that
  // disappeared, or DM/meetup unread state and types get wiped every load.
  rooms.forEach(r => { roomTypeLookup[r.id] = { type: r.type, name: r.name }; });
  const validIds = new Set(rooms.map(r => r.id));
  const pruned = [];
  for (const rid of Object.keys(roomTypeLookup)) {
    if (validIds.has(rid)) continue;
    const t = roomTypeLookup[rid].type;
    if (t !== 'stage' && t !== 'general') continue;
    delete roomTypeLookup[rid];
    if (unreadByRoom[rid] !== undefined) delete unreadByRoom[rid];
    pruned.push(rid);
  }
  if (pruned.length) dbg('[BADGE] loadRooms pruned stale stage/general entries:', pruned.join(','));
  updateTabBadges();
}

function renderRoomList() {
  dbg('[ROOM] renderRoomList');
  const app = document.getElementById('app');
  const roomsHtml = _renderRoomItemsHtml();

  if (isMobile) {
    app.innerHTML = `
      <div class="header">
        <span class="title">Chats</span>
        <button class="hamburger" onclick="toggleChatMenu()">${ICON_HAMBURGER}<span class="hamburger-dot"></span></button>
      </div>
      <div class="content" style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center">
        <div class="empty">Tap the menu to pick a room</div>
      </div>
      ${_renderChatMenuHtml()}`;
    setTimeout(() => toggleChatMenu(), 100);
  } else {
    app.innerHTML = `
      <div class="sidebar visible">
        <div class="tabs">
          <button class="active" onclick="switchTab(this,'stages')">Rooms<span class="tab-dot"></span></button>
          <button onclick="switchTab(this,'meetups')">Meetups<span class="tab-dot"></span></button>
          <button onclick="switchTab(this,'dms')">DMs<span class="tab-dot"></span></button>
        </div>
        <div class="content"><ul class="room-list" id="room-list">${roomsHtml}</ul></div>
        <div class="member-list" id="member-list"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="main-panel visible">
        <div class="header"><span class="title" style="color:#aaa">Select a room</span></div>
        <div class="content"><div class="empty">Choose a room to start chatting</div></div>
      </div>`;
  }
  const roomItems = document.querySelectorAll('.room-item');
  verify('renderRoomList', roomItems.length > 0, roomItems.length + ' room items in DOM');
  verify('renderRoomList', document.getElementById('room-list'), 'room-list element exists');
  updateTabBadges();
}

function _isDmsTabActive() {
  const activeBtn = document.querySelector('.tabs button.active');
  return !!activeBtn && activeBtn.textContent.trim() === 'DMs';
}

function switchTab(btn, tab) {
  dbg('[ROOM] switchTab', tab);
  btn.parentElement.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  if (tab === 'meetups') loadMeetups();
  else if (tab === 'dms') loadDMs();
  else renderRoomItems();
}

function _renderRoomItemsHtml() {
  return rooms.map(r => {
    const count = (onlineByRoom[r.id] || []).length || r.online_count;
    const unread = unreadByRoom[r.id] || 0;
    const badgeHtml = unread > 0 ? `<span class="unread-badge">${unread > 99 ? '99+' : unread}</span>` : '';
    const isMember = r.is_member !== false;
    const bellHtml = r.is_main
      ? `<button type="button" class="room-bell active" onclick="event.stopPropagation()" aria-label="Notifications on"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M18 8A6 6 0 0 0 6 8c0 7-3 9-3 9h18s-3-2-3-9"/><path d="M13.73 21a2 2 0 0 1-3.46 0"/></svg></button>`
      : `<button type="button" class="room-bell${isMember ? ' active' : ''}" onclick="event.stopPropagation();_toggleRoomMembership('${r.id}',this)" aria-label="${isMember ? 'Mute room' : 'Get notified'}"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="${isMember ? 'currentColor' : 'none'}" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M18 8A6 6 0 0 0 6 8c0 7-3 9-3 9h18s-3-2-3-9"/><path d="M13.73 21a2 2 0 0 1-3.46 0"/></svg></button>`;
    const mc = r.member_count || 0;
    const desc = r.description || '';
    return `<li class="room-item${currentRoom === r.id ? ' active' : ''}" data-room-id="${r.id}" onclick="closeChatMenu();openRoom('${r.id}','${jss(r.name)}','${r.type}')">
      <div class="room-info"><div class="room-name">${esc(r.name)}</div><div class="room-count">${mc} ${mc === 1 ? 'member' : 'members'}</div>${desc ? `<div class="room-desc">${esc(desc)}</div>` : ''}</div>
      <span class="room-badge" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">${badgeHtml}</span>
      <span class="room-member-icon" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">${mc} ${USER_ICON}</span>
      ${bellHtml}
    </li>`;
  }).join('');
}

function renderRoomItems() {
  dbg('[ROOM] renderRoomItems');
  const el = document.getElementById('room-list');
  if (!el) return;
  el.innerHTML = _renderRoomItemsHtml();
}

function updateSidebarCount(roomId) {
  dbg('[ROOM] updateSidebarCount', roomId);
  const count = (onlineByRoom[roomId] || []).length;
  const item = document.querySelector(`.room-item[data-room-id="${roomId}"]`);
  if (!item) return;
  const countEl = item.querySelector('.room-count');
  const meetupInfo = item.dataset.meetupInfo;
  if (countEl) {
    if (meetupInfo) {
      countEl.textContent = meetupInfo;
    } else {
      const room = rooms.find(r => r.id === roomId);
      const members = room ? (room.member_count || 0) : 0;
      countEl.textContent = members + (members === 1 ? ' member' : ' members');
    }
  }
  const iconEl = item.querySelector('.room-member-icon');
  if (iconEl) {
    const room = rooms.find(r => r.id === roomId);
    const members = room ? (room.member_count || 0) : 0;
    iconEl.innerHTML = members + ' ' + USER_ICON;
  }
}

function updateHeaderCount() {
  dbg('[ROOM] updateHeaderCount');
  if (!currentRoom || currentRoomType === 'dm') return;
  const room = rooms.find(r => r.id === currentRoom);
  const members = room ? (room.member_count || 0) : 0;
  const countEl = document.querySelector('.header-count');
  if (countEl) {
    countEl.innerHTML = members + ' ' + USER_ICON;
  } else {
    const el = document.querySelector('.header .online');
    if (el) el.textContent = members + (members === 1 ? ' member' : ' members');
  }
}

function switchMemberTab(btn, tab) {
  dbg('[MEMBERS] switchMemberTab', tab);
  memberTab = tab;
  btn.parentElement.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  storageSet('memberTab', tab);
  renderMemberItems();
}

function renderMemberList() {
  const el = document.getElementById('member-list');
  if (!el) return;
  if (!currentRoom) { el.innerHTML = ''; return; }
  dbg('[MEMBERS] renderMemberList', currentRoom);
  const tabsHtml = `<div class="member-tabs">
    <button class="${memberTab === 'online' ? 'active' : ''}" onclick="switchMemberTab(this,'online')">Online</button>
    <button class="${memberTab === 'offline' ? 'active' : ''}" onclick="switchMemberTab(this,'offline')">Offline</button>
  </div>`;
  el.innerHTML = tabsHtml + '<div class="member-list-items" id="member-items"></div>';
  renderMemberItems();
}

function renderMemberItems() {
  const container = document.getElementById('member-items');
  if (!container) return;
  const online = onlineByRoom[currentRoom] || [];
  const onlineIds = new Set(online.map(u => u.user_id));
  const allMembers = membersByRoom[currentRoom] || [];
  let users;
  if (memberTab === 'online') {
    users = online;
  } else {
    users = allMembers.filter(m => !onlineIds.has(m.user_id));
  }
  const sorted = [...users].sort((a, b) => {
    if (a.user_id === currentUser?.id) return -1;
    if (b.user_id === currentUser?.id) return 1;
    const aBlocked = blockedUserIds.has(a.user_id) ? 1 : 0;
    const bBlocked = blockedUserIds.has(b.user_id) ? 1 : 0;
    if (aBlocked !== bBlocked) return aBlocked - bBlocked;
    return (a.display_name || a.username || '').localeCompare(b.display_name || b.username || '');
  });
  container.innerHTML = sorted.map(u => {
    const name = u.display_name || u.username || 'Anonymous';
    const isSelf = u.user_id === currentUser?.id;
    const blocked = blockedUserIds.has(u.user_id);
    const av = avatarHtml(name, u.color_index || 0, true, u.avatar_url || '');
    const flag = countryFlag(u.country);
    const onclick = isSelf ? 'showSettingsMenu()' : `showUserMenu('${u.user_id}','${jss(name)}')`;
    return `<div class="member-item${isSelf ? ' member-item-self' : ''}${blocked ? ' member-blocked' : ''}" data-user-id="${u.user_id}" onclick="${onclick}">
      ${av}
      <span class="member-name">${esc(name)}${isSelf ? ' (you)' : ''}</span>
      ${flag ? `<span class="member-flag">${flag}</span>` : ''}
    </div>`;
  }).join('') || '<div class="empty">No users</div>';
}

function updateBadge(roomId) {
  const item = document.querySelector(`[data-room-id="${roomId}"]`);
  if (!item) return;
  const badge = item.querySelector('.room-badge');
  if (!badge) return;
  const existing = badge.querySelector('.unread-badge');
  const count = unreadByRoom[roomId] || 0;
  if (count > 0) {
    const html = `<span class="unread-badge">${count > 99 ? '99+' : count}</span>`;
    if (existing) existing.outerHTML = html;
    else badge.insertAdjacentHTML('afterbegin', html);
  } else if (existing) existing.remove();
}

function refreshAllBadges() {
  document.querySelectorAll('.room-item[data-room-id], .member-item[data-room-id]').forEach(item => updateBadge(item.dataset.roomId));
  updateTabBadges();
}

function updateTabBadges() {
  const byType = { rooms: 0, meetup: 0, dm: 0 };
  for (const [rid, count] of Object.entries(unreadByRoom)) {
    const t = roomTypeLookup[rid]?.type;
    if (t === 'stage' || t === 'general') byType.rooms += count;
    else if (t === 'meetup') byType.meetup += count;
    else if (t === 'dm') byType.dm += count;
  }
  document.querySelectorAll('.tabs button').forEach((btn, i) => {
    const dot = btn.querySelector('.tab-dot');
    if (dot) dot.classList.toggle('active', [byType.rooms, byType.meetup, byType.dm][i] > 0);
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('.menu-dot').forEach((dot, i) => {
    dot.classList.toggle('active', [byType.rooms, byType.meetup, byType.dm][i] > 0);
  });
  const total = Object.values(unreadByRoom).reduce((s, c) => s + c, 0);
  document.querySelector('.hamburger-dot')?.classList.toggle('active', total > 0);
  _updateTitleBadge();
}

let _hiddenUnread = 0;
function _updateTitleBadge() {
  const total = Object.values(unreadByRoom).reduce((s, c) => s + c, 0) + _hiddenUnread;
  const _titleBase = _siteShort ? 'Chat · ' + _siteShort : 'Chat';
  document.title = total > 0 ? `(${total}) ${_titleBase}` : _titleBase;
}

async function loadMeetups() {
  dbg('[MEETUP] loadMeetups');
  const el = document.getElementById('room-list');
  if (!el) return;
  try {
    const meetups = await api('/meetups');
    if (!meetups.length) { el.innerHTML = '<div class="empty">No active meetups</div>'; return; }
    el.innerHTML = meetups.map(m => {
      const unread = unreadByRoom[m.id] || 0;
      const badgeHtml = unread > 0 ? `<span class="unread-badge">${unread > 99 ? '99+' : unread}</span>` : '';
      const online = (onlineByRoom[m.id] || []).length;
      const countParts = [fmtTime(m.meetup_time), m.attendee_count + ' going'];
      if (online > 0) countParts.push(online + ' online');
      const isGoing = m.is_going;
      return `<li class="room-item${currentRoom === m.id ? ' active' : ''}" data-room-id="${m.id}" data-room-type="meetup" data-meetup-info="${esc(fmtTime(m.meetup_time))} · ${m.attendee_count} going" onclick="openRoom('${m.id}','${jss(m.title)}','meetup')">
        <div class="room-info">
          <div class="room-name">${esc(m.title)}</div>
          <div class="room-count">${countParts.join(' · ')}</div>
        </div>
        <span class="room-badge">${badgeHtml}</span>
        <button type="button" class="room-bell${isGoing ? ' active' : ''}" onclick="event.stopPropagation();_toggleMeetupGoing('${m.id}',this)" aria-label="${isGoing ? 'Mute meetup' : 'Get notified'}"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="${isGoing ? 'currentColor' : 'none'}" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M18 8A6 6 0 0 0 6 8c0 7-3 9-3 9h18s-3-2-3-9"/><path d="M13.73 21a2 2 0 0 1-3.46 0"/></svg></button>
      </li>`;
    }).join('');
  } catch { el.innerHTML = '<div class="empty">Could not load meetups</div>'; }
}

async function _toggleRoomMembership(roomId, btn) {
  dbg('[ROOM] toggleMembership', roomId);
  const isMember = btn.classList.contains('active');
  try {
    await fetch(API + '/rooms/' + roomId + '/join', { method: isMember ? 'DELETE' : 'POST', credentials: 'include' });
    const room = rooms.find(r => r.id === roomId);
    if (room) room.is_member = !isMember;
    btn.classList.toggle('active');
    btn.querySelector('svg').setAttribute('fill', isMember ? 'none' : 'currentColor');
    if (isMember && ws && ws.readyState === 1) wsSend('leave_room', { room_id: roomId });
    else if (!isMember && ws && ws.readyState === 1) wsSend('join_room', { room_id: roomId });
    setTimeout(async () => {
      await loadRooms();
      renderRoomItems();
      const menuRooms = document.querySelector('#menu-rooms.open');
      if (menuRooms) menuRooms.innerHTML = '<ul class="room-list">' + _renderRoomItemsHtml() + '</ul>';
    }, 1000);
  } catch (e) { showToast(e.message); }
}

async function _toggleMeetupGoing(meetupId, btn) {
  dbg('[MEETUP] toggleGoing', meetupId);
  const isGoing = btn.classList.contains('active');
  try {
    await api('/meetups/' + meetupId + '/join', { method: isGoing ? 'DELETE' : 'POST' });
    btn.classList.toggle('active');
    btn.querySelector('svg').setAttribute('fill', isGoing ? 'none' : 'currentColor');
  } catch (e) { showToast(e.message); }
}

async function loadDMs() {
  dbg('[DM] loadDMs');
  const el = document.getElementById('room-list');
  if (!el) return;
  try {
    const dms = await api('/dms');
    dms.forEach(dm => {
      _dmListCache[dm.room_id] = dm.other_user_id;
      // Sync fallback state from the server's key knowledge so the lock icon
      // is truthful on first render, not just after a send attempt 404s.
      if (dm.other_has_key === false) _unencryptedRooms.add(dm.room_id);
      else _unencryptedRooms.delete(dm.room_id);
    });
    if (!dms.length) { el.innerHTML = '<div class="empty">No conversations yet</div>'; return; }
    el.innerHTML = dms.map(dm => {
      const unread = unreadByRoom[dm.room_id] || 0;
      const badgeHtml = unread > 0 ? `<span class="unread-badge">${unread > 99 ? '99+' : unread}</span>` : '';
      const av = avatarHtml(dm.other_name, dm.other_color_index || 0, true, dm.other_avatar_url || '');
      const flag = countryFlag(dm.other_country);
      const lockHtml = _unencryptedRooms.has(dm.room_id) ? '' : ICON_LOCK;
      return `<div class="member-item${currentRoom === dm.room_id ? ' member-item-self' : ''}" data-room-id="${dm.room_id}" onclick="openRoom('${dm.room_id}','${jss(dm.other_name)}','dm')">
        ${av}
        <span class="member-name">${lockHtml}${esc(dm.other_name)}</span>
        <span class="room-badge">${badgeHtml}</span>
        ${flag ? `<span class="member-flag">${flag}</span>` : ''}
      </div>`;
    }).join('');
    dbg('[E2EE] loadDMs: rendered lock icons for ' + dms.filter(dm => !_unencryptedRooms.has(dm.room_id)).length + '/' + dms.length + ' DMs');
  } catch { el.innerHTML = '<div class="empty">Could not load DMs</div>'; }
}

// --- Chat View ---
async function openRoom(roomId, roomName, roomType) {
  dbg('openRoom:', roomId, roomName, roomType);
  if (roomId === currentRoom) return;
  if (currentRoom) {
    wsSend('leave_room', { room_id: currentRoom });
  }
  _decryptRetried.clear();
  currentRoom = roomId;
  currentRoomName = roomName;
  currentRoomType = roomType || 'stage';
  delete unreadByRoom[roomId];
  updateTabBadges();
  _clearRoomNotifications(roomId);
  _updateAppBadge();
  if (!isMobile && !document.querySelector('.main-panel')) {
    dbg('openRoom: creating desktop layout first');
    renderRoomList();
  }
  const tabMap = { dm: 'dms', meetup: 'meetups' };
  const targetTab = tabMap[currentRoomType] || 'stages';
  const sidebar = document.querySelector('.sidebar') || document.querySelector('.tabs')?.parentElement;
  if (sidebar) {
    const tabs = sidebar.querySelectorAll('.tabs button');
    const tabNames = ['stages', 'meetups', 'dms'];
    tabs.forEach((btn, i) => {
      btn.classList.toggle('active', tabNames[i] === targetTab);
    });
  }
  if (targetTab === 'dms') loadDMs();
  else if (targetTab === 'meetups') loadMeetups();
  else renderRoomItems();
  renderChatView(roomName);
  if (currentRoomType === 'dm') {
    const unencrypted = _unencryptedRooms.has(roomId);
    dbg('[E2EE] openRoom: dm header lock, room=' + roomId + ' unencrypted=' + unencrypted);
    if (!unencrypted) {
      document.querySelectorAll('.header .title').forEach(t => t.insertAdjacentHTML('afterbegin', ICON_LOCK));
    }
    history.replaceState(null, '', '/chat/d/' + roomId);
  }
  else if (currentRoomType === 'meetup') history.replaceState(null, '', '/chat/m/' + roomId);
  else if (rooms.length > 1) history.replaceState(null, '', '/chat/r/' + roomId);
  const historyReady = new Promise(r => { window._roomHistoryResolve = r; setTimeout(r, 3000); });
  if (roomId === 'pending-dm') {
    window._roomHistoryResolve?.(); window._roomHistoryResolve = null;
  } else if (ws && ws.readyState === 1) {
    wsSend('join_room', { room_id: roomId });
  } else {
    try {
      const msgs = await api('/rooms/' + roomId + '/messages');
      messagesByRoom[roomId] = msgs;
      renderMessages();
      scrollToBottom();
    } catch (e) { dbg('[CHAT] openRoom REST error:', e); }
    await connectWS();
    if (ws && ws.readyState === 1) {
      wsSend('join_room', { room_id: roomId });
    }
  }
  await historyReady;
  if (currentRoomType === 'dm' && roomId !== 'pending-dm') _verifyDmEncryptionState(roomId);
  verify('openRoom', currentRoom === roomId, 'currentRoom set to ' + roomId);
  verify('openRoom', document.getElementById('msg-input'), 'message input exists');
  verify('openRoom', document.getElementById('messages'), 'messages container exists');
  if (!isMobile) document.getElementById('msg-input')?.focus();
}

async function _verifyDmEncryptionState(roomId) {
  // The lock icon and banner render from _unencryptedRooms, which is synced
  // by loadDMs and by send-time 404s -- both can be stale or empty (deep
  // link, peer uploaded a key since). Verify against the server whenever a
  // DM opens and fix the UI if the state changed.
  if (!E2EE.available) return;
  const peer = _getDmPeerUserId(roomId);
  if (!peer) { dbg('[E2EE] verify state: peer unresolved for', roomId); return; }
  try {
    const wasUnencrypted = _unencryptedRooms.has(roomId);
    const r = await fetch('/chat/api/keys/' + peer, { credentials: 'same-origin' });
    if (r.status === 404) _unencryptedRooms.add(roomId);
    else if (r.ok) _unencryptedRooms.delete(roomId);
    else return; // transient server error: leave current state alone
    const nowUnencrypted = _unencryptedRooms.has(roomId);
    dbg('[E2EE] verified dm state, room=' + roomId + ' unencrypted=' + nowUnencrypted);
    if (nowUnencrypted === wasUnencrypted || currentRoom !== roomId) return;
    renderMessages();
    document.querySelectorAll('.header .title').forEach(t => {
      const lock = t.querySelector('.icon-lock');
      if (nowUnencrypted && lock) lock.remove();
      else if (!nowUnencrypted && !lock) t.insertAdjacentHTML('afterbegin', ICON_LOCK);
    });
  } catch (e) { dbg('[E2EE] verify dm state failed:', e && e.message); }
}

function renderChatView(roomName) {
  dbg('[CHAT] renderChatView', roomName);
  const onlineCount = (onlineByRoom[currentRoom] || []).length;
  const currentRoomObj = rooms.find(r => r.id === currentRoom);

      <div class="action-menu" id="action-menu">
        ${showMeetupBtn ? '<button onclick="openMeetupModal(); closeActionMenu()"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" width="16" height="16"><path d="M2 12C2 8.22876 2 6.34315 3.17157 5.17157C4.34315 4 6.22876 4 10 4H14C17.7712 4 19.6569 4 20.8284 5.17157C22 6.34315 22 8.22876 22 12V14C22 17.7712 22 19.6569 20.8284 20.8284C19.6569 22 17.7712 22 14 22H10C6.22876 22 4.34315 22 3.17157 20.8284C2 19.6569 2 17.7712 2 14V12Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M7 4V2.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M17 4V2.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><circle cx="16.5" cy="16.5" r="1.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M2.5 9H21.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg> Create Meetup</button>' : ''}
        <button onclick="shareLocation(); closeActionMenu()"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" width="16" height="16"><path d="M4 10.1433C4 5.64588 7.58172 2 12 2C16.4183 2 20 5.64588 20 10.1433C20 14.6055 17.4467 19.8124 13.4629 21.6744C12.5343 22.1085 11.4657 22.1085 10.5371 21.6744C6.55332 19.8124 4 14.6055 4 10.1433Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><circle cx="12" cy="10" r="3" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg> Share Location</button>
        <button onclick="uploadImage(); closeActionMenu()"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" width="16" height="16"><path d="M2 12C2 7.28595 2 4.92893 3.46447 3.46447C4.92893 2 7.28595 2 12 2C16.714 2 19.0711 2 20.5355 3.46447C22 4.92893 22 7.28595 22 12C22 16.714 22 19.0711 20.5355 20.5355C19.0711 22 16.714 22 12 22C7.28595 22 4.92893 22 3.46447 20.5355C2 19.0711 2 16.714 2 12Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><circle cx="16" cy="8" r="2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M2 12.5001L3.75159 10.9675C4.66286 10.1702 6.03628 10.2159 6.89249 11.0721L11.1822 15.3618C11.8694 16.0491 12.9512 16.1428 13.7464 15.5839L14.0446 15.3744C15.1888 14.5702 16.7369 14.6634 17.7765 15.599L21 18.5001" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg> Share Photo</button>
        <button onclick="uploadVideo(); closeActionMenu()"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" width="16" height="16"><path d="M2 12C2 7.28595 2 4.92893 3.46447 3.46447C4.92893 2 7.28595 2 12 2C16.714 2 19.0711 2 20.5355 3.46447C22 4.92893 22 7.28595 22 12C22 16.714 22 19.0711 20.5355 20.5355C19.0711 22 16.714 22 12 22C7.28595 22 4.92893 22 3.46447 20.5355C2 19.0711 2 16.714 2 12Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M9.5 8.96533C9.5 8.48805 9.5 8.24941 9.59974 8.11618C9.68666 8.00007 9.81971 7.92744 9.96438 7.9171C10.1304 7.90525 10.3311 8.03429 10.7326 8.29239L15.4532 11.3271C15.8016 11.551 15.9758 11.663 16.0359 11.8054C16.0885 11.9298 16.0885 12.0702 16.0359 12.1946C15.9758 12.337 15.8016 12.449 15.4532 12.6729L10.7326 15.7076C10.3311 15.9657 10.1304 16.0948 9.96438 16.0829C9.81971 16.0726 9.68666 15.9999 9.59974 15.8838C9.5 15.7506 9.5 15.512 9.5 15.0347V8.96533Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg> Share Video</button>

          onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'&&!event.shiftKey){sendMessage();event.preventDefault()}"
          oninput="autoResizeInput(this)"></textarea>
        <button class="emoji-btn" onclick="openEmoji()"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M9 16C9.85038 16.6303 10.8846 17 12 17C13.1154 17 14.1496 16.6303 15 16" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M16 10.5C16 11.3284 15.5523 12 15 12C14.4477 12 14 11.3284 14 10.5C14 9.67157 14.4477 9 15 9C15.5523 9 16 9.67157 16 10.5Z" fill="currentColor"/><ellipse cx="9" cy="10.5" rx="1" ry="1.5" fill="currentColor"/></svg></button>
      </div>
      <button class="send" onclick="sendMessage()"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M8 12C12.6863 12 11.3137 12 16 12M16 12L13 9M16 12L13 15" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></button>
    </div>`;

  const avatarSrc = currentUser?.avatar_url || '';
  const headerAvatar = avatarSrc
    ? `<div class="header-avatar" onclick="showSettingsMenu()"><img src="${esc(avatarSrc)}"></div>`
    : `<div class="header-avatar" onclick="showSettingsMenu()" style="background:var(--gray-500);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#fff;font-size:var(--font-xs);font-weight:700">${(currentUser?.display_name || currentUser?.username || '?')[0].toUpperCase()}</div>`;

  if (isMobile) {
    const roomDesc = currentRoomObj?.description || '';

      <div class="header">
        <a href="/line-up" class="nav-icon" aria-label="Line-up" onclick="event.preventDefault();location.href='/line-up'">${ICON_CALENDAR}</a>
